Add a compact active-drag footer state so keyboard/mouse users and proof tooling can see when kittwm is currently consuming title-drag motion. Filed from ongoing kittwm drag UX audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm native chrome: avoid Debug-formatting full scenes for redraw keys
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: native_shell_chrome_scene_key no longer joins labels, but native_shell_chrome_scene_visual_hash still hashes format!("{scene:?}"), allocating a full Debug string for every chrome redraw check. Scope: hash scene id plus layer labels directly so visual paint and label changes still invalidate, without formatting the whole scene, and add focused coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm native failure logs: build socket input line directly
description: native_socket_input_failure_log_line uses whole-line format! for native socket input diagnostics. Build the line directly with a preallocated buffer while preserving bounded error text.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Report waypipe availability in remote graphical doctor
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: remote graphical doctor reports X11 forwarding and WAYLAND_DISPLAY but not whether Wayland forwarding tooling is available. Add remote `waypipe` detection to `kittwm remote HOST x11/graphical/forwarding` status output and JSON so users can understand whether a Wayland-capable forwarding path might be available on remotes where X11 is not.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: render SDK semantic snapshots via affordances
description:
Integration gap: kittui-wm has a semantic renderer bridge, and kittwm-sdk now owns the public semantic protocol types. Add a renderer helper that consumes SDK `SemanticSurfaceSnapshot` trees directly and lowers them through kittui-affordances to primitive scenes, so SDK/browser-published trees can be rendered without duplicating or manually converting private kittui-wm semantic structs.

Scope:
- Add a public helper in kittui-wm (or an appropriate adapter module) that renders `kittwm_sdk::SemanticSurfaceSnapshot` into kittui `Scene` output using kittui-affordances controls.
- Preserve existing kittui-wm internal semantic renderer tests.
- Map common SDK roles: button, checkbox, radio group, text input/area, select/list, menu, slider/progress, tabs, split pane, group fallback.
- Add tests with an SDK snapshot including focused/checked/selected/value state.

Acceptance:
- SDK semantic snapshots can be lowered to primitive kittui scenes.
- No high-level controls move into kittui-core.
- Targeted tests and git diff --check pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui-md exposes preserved metadata blocks in outputs
description: Follow-up to bd-30c631/bd-d30fba: Markdown metadata blocks are preserved in MarkdownDocument, but kittui-md output surfaces should expose them consistently, especially --metadata-json, --stats, and plain metadata sections. Add tests and validate kittui-md build.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add keyboard reset shortcut for floating kittwm panes
description: Operator-requested kittwm floating-window UX uplift: the reset control for dragged/nudged floating panes is now available through socket/CLI/SDK, but live users still need to leave the session or use external control to reset a focused floating pane. Add an in-session prefix shortcut, document it in the shared shortcut/help surfaces, and keep it scoped to floating mode.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm commands text: stream catalog rows directly
description: commands_text still uses format! for each category heading and command row while building the local command catalog. Stream headings/rows directly into the output buffer with write!/push_str to reduce transient allocations while preserving CLI output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser capabilities: write text rows directly
description: Small kittwm-browser CLI performance cleanup: browser_capabilities_text uses push_str(format!(...)) for fixed report rows and list items. Build rows directly into the existing output buffer with write!/push_str while preserving capability text.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add categories to kittui-md schemas-json
description: Extend --schemas-json so each schema entry includes the mode category, aligning schema discovery with the rest of the mode discovery JSON surfaces. Document it and add output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm daily-help stress text: build directly
description: The daily-help pathological label clipping test still builds a huge multi-line payload with format!. Build that stress payload directly so the test exercises clipping without an avoidable whole-string format allocation.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: cache status metadata outside frame loop
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser formats a status row every frame and calls `env::var` for KITTWM_WINDOW/KITTWM_SOCKET each time. These values are process-static, so repeated env lookups add avoidable per-frame churn. Cache clipped browser status metadata once at startup and reuse it when rendering status text.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui-md rich render mode: emit actual kitty graphics components
description: Next proposal: kittui-md currently emits a textual/component proof. Add rich render mode that turns MarkdownDocument/UiComponent into actual kittui scenes and kitty graphics placements in a normal terminal, with scrolling and resize handling. Builds on bd-f81b60 initial stack.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-commands: saturate scene row count
description: Audit finding: commands_scene computes rows with entries.len() as u16 + 5 before clamping. While the built-in command catalog is currently small, the pattern can wrap before clamp if it grows/pathologically changes, producing incorrect scene metadata. Saturate/clamp using usize before casting and add focused coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui-md math-only mode for expression inspection
description: Add a kittui-md --math mode that prints only parsed inline/display math expressions with kind and source. This complements --code-blocks and --definitions for focused extraction. Include output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm evidence audit: reject artifacts that show broken output
description: Recent kittwm evidence artifacts often show command/test output or visibly broken feature output while being used as proof. Audit and harden the evidence workflow: classify broken artifacts as regression evidence, document the close-time gate, and add/route follow-up bugs for any artifacts that demonstrate broken kittwm UX instead of the claimed behavior.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: route focus and basic actions for published semantic snapshots
description:
Semantic runtime follow-up: SEMANTIC_PUBLISH stores component trees, but SEMANTIC_ACTION and SEMANTIC_FOCUS still return unsupported. Implement a first safe action/focus path for published semantic snapshots only.

Scope:
- For panes/windows with a published semantic snapshot, implement SEMANTIC_FOCUS by updating the snapshot focus and focused state flags.
- Implement a conservative subset of SEMANTIC_ACTION on published snapshots: focus, toggle bool/checked controls, set text/number/selection values when payload shape matches.
- Keep PTY fallback snapshots action/focus unsupported.
- Emit clear errors for missing components/actions/invalid payloads.
- Add targeted daemon tests for publish -> focus/action -> snapshot readback.

Acceptance:
- Published semantic trees can be focused and mutated through semantic socket commands.
- Fallback terminal text-area semantic snapshots remain read-only.
- Targeted tests and git diff --check pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: default libghostty terminal with configurable Nord translucent rendering
description: Operator request after bd-3f6893: make the libghostty terminal backend the default via the user kittwm config in ~/.config/kittwm/config.yaml, and fix the libghostty rendering appearance. The current rendering is off; it needs a translucent background and Nord theme, and those rendering values should be configurable rather than hardcoded. Additional operator request: the inner libghostty surface should be as capable as normal Ghostty where the libghostty-vt API supports it, including enabling/advertising Ghostty terminal features such as kitty graphics protocol support rather than using a stripped-down mode. Scope: inspect landed kittwm config support, add config/env plumbing for terminal backend/app and libghostty preview theme/background opacity/feature knobs where appropriate, update the home config to select libghostty by default with Nord translucent styling, and add targeted tests/docs. Filed from Harry's 2026-05-26 request.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Set up integration testing harness for Ghostty terminal
description:
Establish a testing harness that can drive Ghostty terminal programmatically to enable automated integration testing. This harness should support:
- Automated terminal input/output capture
- Screenshot capture functionality
- Integration with Ghostty.app
- Support for Kittem (terminal emulator validation tool)

Acceptance criteria:
- Harness can successfully drive Ghostty terminal commands
- Screenshot capture works reliably
- Harness is documented and ready for test scenario execution
creator: helsinki:cacophony:harry

title: kittwm: route browser semantic actions through DevTools
description: Route SEMANTIC_ACTION and SEMANTIC_FOCUS for browser semantic nodes to DevTools/DOM operations such as focus, activate/click, set value, insert text, select option, and scroll. Return stale-component errors when ids no longer resolve. Follow-up from bd-2250e1.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Move kittui_wm_demo example to use kittui_cli::session::run_loop
description: The session loop has been extracted into kittui_cli::session for the new kitwm binary (bd-c60dd8). The kittui_wm_demo example still has its own copy. Replace the example's run_loop with a call to kittui_cli::session::run_loop and delete the duplicated raw-mode + debugger code from the example. Reduces example to ~80 lines of backend setup.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: List Linux desktop apps in installed kittwm JSON
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: when a Linux remote has healthy kittwm installed, `kittwm remote HOST apps --json` delegates to local `kittwm apps --json`, which currently reports PATH (and macOS) candidates but not Linux `.desktop` launcher metadata. Add Linux desktop entry discovery to local app JSON so healthy remote kittwm has parity with the pooled-SSH fallback app listing path.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm keymap duplicate tests: build alternate key directly
description: Replace test-only `format!("{large_key}-other")` in `keymap_duplicate_count_uses_chord_identity` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only kittwm keymap duplicate-count test data in `crates/kittui-cli/src/bin/kittwm.rs`; preserve duplicate chord identity coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui render: export animation frames for animated scenes
description: Continue animation coverage for `kittui render`: scene builders can now create animated Scene JSON, but `kittui render` only emits a still PNG for a single scene and rejects `--out-dir` for single scenes. Acceptance: when rendering a single animated Scene with `--out-dir`, export every animation frame as PNG files plus manifest metadata; keep static single-scene behavior unchanged.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Request SSH graphical forwarding for remote app launch
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: when local kittwm launches a remote app via `kittwm remote HOST launch QUERY` / remote apps launch-first fallback, the SSH command should request graphical forwarding (trusted X11) so GUI apps have a path to appear from the local host terminal session. Listing/status/window/display/terminal probes should remain non-X11.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: implement more native PTY cursor CSI modes
description:
Terminal fidelity gap: native PTY cursor movement only handles A/B/C/D and H/f. Common terminal programs also use cursor-horizontal-absolute (`CSI n G`), vertical-position-absolute (`CSI n d`), horizontal/vertical relative forms (`CSI n a/e`), and next/previous line (`CSI n E/F`). Missing these sequences can corrupt rendered panes and READ_TEXT snapshots.

Scope:
- Implement CSI `G`, `d`, `a`, `e`, `E`, and `F` in native `TerminalState`.
- Preserve existing 1-based/clamped semantics.
- Add focused parser/text snapshot tests.

Acceptance:
- Cursor absolute/relative movement modes update output positions correctly.
- Targeted kittui-wm tests and `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: bindings: add primitive gradient scene helpers
description:
Large external-platform renderer gap: Python/TypeScript scene helpers now make solid boxes easy, but gradient scenes still require hand-authored Scene JSON (and the existing TS backgroundLinear helper is only a placeholder layer). Gradients are one of kittui's core shell-renderer primitives and should be first-party in platform bindings.

Scope:
- Add Python `scene.gradient_layer(...)` and `scene.gradient_box(...)` helpers.
- Add TypeScript `scene.gradientLayer(...)` and `scene.gradientBox(...)` helpers.
- Keep helpers primitive-only and JSON-compatible.
- Add binding tests and README examples.

Acceptance:
- Python and TS users can build a valid gradient Scene without hand-authoring schema.
- Python and TS tests pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add kittui-md examples discovery outputs
description: Add --examples and --examples-json no-input discovery outputs for kittui-md so users and tools can list common invocation examples. Document it and add parser/output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm native pane border: build status-chip label directly
description: Replace the `format!("pane-{idx}-status-chip:{}", pane.status)` label in `native_pane_border_scene(...)` with a direct preallocated label helper. Scope only the non-test native pane border status-chip layer label in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing native shell affordance scene labels and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add SDK helpers for pane title marker prefixes
description: UX/SDK follow-up: kittwm title rows now carry a compact marker language for focus, tiled reorder, resized, fullscreen, floating drag/top/moved state, but SDK consumers still need to recompose those glyphs from many booleans. Add title marker prefix helpers on NativePaneDetail and focused Status/PanesStatus so automation/docs can mirror visible title state consistently. Filed from ongoing kittwm UX/SDK audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm graphical command palette: build title directly
description: Replace `format!("kittwm command palette query={query}")` in test-only `command_palette_scene(...)` with a direct preallocated title helper. Scope only graphical command palette scene title construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing scene labels and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kitwm config inspect + Ctrl-A Shift-r reload config state
description: Port the safe collective WM reloadConfig default into terminal-safe kitwm. Add action reload.config, default bind Ctrl-A Shift-r, live runtime reload counter/log/footer state, and a visible 'kitwm config' command that prints config paths/env (KITTUI_WM_KEYMAP, KITTUI_WM_LAUNCH_CMD, KITTUI_WM_LAUNCH_QUERY) plus keymap validation status. Parent: bd-031e54; supports configurable WM defaults.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm ratakittui test tempdirs: build directly
description: Replace ratakittui widget test tempdir filename `format!` in `crates/ratakittui/src/widgets.rs` with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only ratakittui/kittwm chrome widget test tempdir path construction.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm config: report HiDPI and pixel gap tuning
description: Follow-up UX after configurable HiDPI/gaps landed: surface the effective kittwm display tuning in `kittwm config` and config scene labels so users can verify HiDPI, cell-size overrides, and tile/header/footer pixel gaps without reading docs or guessing environment state. Keep scope to CLI diagnostics/config output; avoid active command-scene micro-perf and mouse-routing work.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add kittui-md interactive definitions toggle
description: Add a native definitions toggle to kittui-md --interactive so users can press d to inspect definition-list entries without leaving the pager. Reuse existing definition metadata, expose the keybinding, document it, and add targeted pager/definition-screen tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm restore-session invalid-json reply: build directly
description: RESTORE_SESSION_JSON invalid-json errors still use format! to append the parse error. Build that reply directly while preserving invalid restore-session validation coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: add native capabilities text view
description: Add a human-readable `kittwm-browser --capabilities` / `--native-capabilities` view that renders the same SDK/kittui/kitty-native capability contract as `--capabilities-json` for operators. Scope to kittwm_browser.rs only; avoid kittwm.rs info/shortcuts work, SDK ArchitectureContract/native-surfaces helpers, terminal/launch/bar/session/runtime internals.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add kittwm title marker legend to shortcuts help
description: UX discoverability follow-up: kittwm title chrome now has a rich marker vocabulary (focus, tiled reorder, resized, fullscreen, floating drag/top/moved), but the in-app shortcut overlay/catalog does not explain those markers. Add a concise title-marker legend to the shared shortcut/help catalog and JSON output so users can discover marker meaning from C-a ? / kittwm shortcuts. Filed from ongoing kittwm UX audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm PTY renderer: silence unused checked pixel helper warnings
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: after moving font/box/bitmap/background/cursor paths to in-bounds pixel helpers, the generic checked blend_rgba_pixel and set_rgba_pixel helpers are only used by tests. Building kittui-wm now emits dead_code warnings in downstream test runs, adding noise while investigating renderer performance. Scope: gate the checked helpers to tests or otherwise remove the warnings while preserving in-bounds helper coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-sdk: add typed native pane status details
description:
SDK usability gap: kittwm STATUS_JSON/PANES_JSON now expose rich native pane detail including cursor modes, mouse modes, geometry, dirty-frame metrics, and transport diagnostics, but kittwm-sdk only has a minimal Status struct. Add typed pane detail/status types so SDK clients do not have to inspect serde_json::Value manually.

Scope:
- Add kittwm-sdk structs for NativePaneStatus/dirty-frame/transport diagnostics matching current daemon JSON shape.
- Add `Kittwm::panes()` and/or `Kittwm::panes_json()` typed helper over PANES_JSON.
- Keep unknown/missing fields backward-compatible with serde defaults.
- Add deserialization tests for pane detail with geometry/cursor/mouse/dirty/transport fields.

Acceptance:
- SDK clients can fetch typed pane details.
- Tests cover current rich JSON shape and missing optional fields.
- git diff --check passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm --serve binds Unix socket + --attach connects (minimal protocol)
description: Minimal daemon/client v1 for bd-fb5d9d/bd-aaea73. kitwm --serve binds $KITTUI_WM_DISPLAY (default /tmp/kitwm-0.sock) and accepts one client at a time. kitwm --attach connects, sends a Hello, receives a Welcome, runs a passthrough where stdin from the client goes to the daemon and the daemon's render bytes come back. Backend hosted by the daemon; client is a renderer only. Parent: bd-fb5d9d/bd-aaea73.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm live launcher overlay: Ctrl-A Enter opens type-to-filter boxed menu
description: Move the launcher preview into the live raw-mode session. Add --launcher-overlay so Ctrl-A Enter opens a boxed overlay in-session; typed chars filter candidates, Backspace edits, Enter launches selected first row, Esc closes. Keep default behavior without the flag for compatibility. Parent: bd-031e54; decomposes bd-8d64b1.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm PTY capture: check frame cache before cloning terminal state
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: TerminalSurface::capture clones the entire TerminalState, including cells and scrollback, before checking whether cached_revision_frame can return the cached frame. On unchanged frames this makes the frame cache much less useful and can be very expensive with large scrollback. Scope: check revision against the cached frame while holding the lock first, clone/render only on cache miss, and add focused coverage for cache-hit behavior.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittui-md metadata JSON records input path when available
description: Extend kittui-md --metadata-json source metadata to include the input file path when a file is provided, while keeping stdin output path null. Add tests for both path and stdin-style cases.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm help topic scene: build row labels directly
description: Small kittwm help-scene performance cleanup: help_topic_scene_for_cols still builds each row layer label with format! from topic, row index, and trimmed row label. Add a direct preallocated row-label helper while preserving scene output and focused label tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm quickstart: mention first-party helper workflows
description:
Continue focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces, chrome-scene, or native move-log work. The `kittwm quickstart` daily-driver path introduces core commands but does not point at the first-party helper workflows recently surfaced in examples and cheat (`kittwm-launch`, `kittwm-terminal`, `kittwm-top`, `kittwm-bar`, `kittwm-browser`). Add a concise helper step or note plus focused assertion coverage so first-run users can discover those helpers from quickstart too.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Doc: SSH operator walkthrough
description:
docs/operator-walkthrough.md: step-by-step for the SSH-into-Mac use case. Includes generating an SSH key for kittui-wm, enabling Screen Recording for sshd, setting KITTUI_WM_DISPLAY, attaching, detaching, killing the session. Parent epic: bd-031e54

---

Duplicate of bd-a6da4e
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: skip raw footer when overlays leave no safe row
description: Follow-up bug-hunt finding after keeping the raw compositor footer below text overlays: on short terminals, the launcher/picker overlay may consume the available rows. Forcing the footer to row 18/16 can move the cursor beyond the screen and cause scrolling or corruption. Compute an optional safe footer row using the current terminal height; skip the volatile status footer while an overlay leaves no safe row. Add deterministic helper coverage for normal, overlay, and too-short terminal cases.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm-renderer: guard ANSI pane chrome bounds
description: Audit finding: non-graphical native pane chrome still writes pane title text at raw coordinates with no visible-row/width guard. Narrow/stale layouts can wrap or write below the terminal, leaving stale chrome and flicker. Guard ANSI pane chrome writes to visible terminal bounds and pad clipped titles to clear stale tails.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: add headless libghostty-vt preview artifact
description:
Extend the portable libghostty-vt prototype with headless preview artifacts. Use libghostty-vt via Nix/Cargo to feed VT bytes, snapshot terminal text/state, and generate a deterministic PNG preview without using macOS Ghostty.app or desktop capture. This is a stepping stone toward kittui-ghostty/kittwm native terminal surfaces.

Acceptance:
- Add a small headless preview example or API in kittui-ghostty-vt that emits a PNG artifact from a libghostty-vt snapshot.
- Keep implementation portable and Nix/Cargo backed.
- Document that this is an interim text/raster preview over Ghostty VT state; full render-state cell/color extraction remains next.
- Validate with focused cargo tests/check/run and post generated image artifact.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-launch scene: build backdrop label directly
description: Small kittwm-launch scene performance cleanup: launch_plan_scene_for_cols still builds the backdrop layer label with `format!("kittwm-launch-plan-backdrop:{}", backend)`. Build that label directly into a preallocated String while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: expose dirty-frame metrics in native status
description:
Follow-up from bd-510a36. Expose dirty-frame metrics so renderer policy and debugging can observe how much of each native surface changes over time.

Scope:
- Track dirty tile count/fraction for native raw-frame surfaces when dirty-grid measurement is enabled.
- Expose the latest dirty metrics in native status/events or a narrow debug surface.
- Avoid changing rendering behavior.
- Add tests for metric calculation and serialization/status exposure.

Acceptance:
- Dirty tile count/fraction can be observed without enabling partial updates.
- No default rendering behavior changes.
- Targeted tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add kittui-md interactive reload status messages
description: Add an in-pager status message for kittui-md --interactive reloads so pressing r reports reload success or failure without silently changing state or tearing down the pager on transient file errors. Document behavior and add targeted tests for status rendering/reload handling.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add kittui-md interactive images toggle
description: Add a native images toggle to kittui-md --interactive so users can press i to inspect document image references without leaving the pager. Reuse existing image metadata, expose the keybinding, document it, and add targeted pager/image-screen tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: forward Enter key events to pages
description: Kittwm-browser currently turns CR/LF into text newlines. Browser pages often need real Enter keyDown/keyUp events for forms, buttons, and focused controls; sending only text can fail to submit or activate controls. Scope: parse CR/LF as an ordered Enter action, dispatch Enter through the browser native surface, and add focused parser/dispatch coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm dirty grid: reuse tile hash buffer
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: DirtyGrid::diff_rgba builds a fresh Vec of tile hashes and assigns it to previous_hashes every frame. Static or mostly-static native frames still pay repeated allocation/copy churn while diffing for skipped uploads. Scope: reuse the previous_hashes buffer across frames, compute/update tile hashes in place, preserve dirty-tile semantics with focused tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-launch: size plan scene from terminal width
description: Resize follow-up: `kittwm-launch` graphical plan scenes use `KITTWM_LAUNCH_PLAN_COLS` or static `COLUMNS`, then fall back to 64. In a hosted/resized PTY, `COLUMNS` can be stale while terminal detection knows the current canvas width. Mirror the kittwm-bar/kittwm-terminal fixes: fall back to `TerminalInfo::detect().columns` before the fixed default while preserving explicit valid overrides/caps; add focused coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm-help: show text in C-a ? overlay
description: User report: C-a ? opens the shortcuts/help overlay but no text appears; it is only empty window chrome with rows/chips, and the bottom button-like controls are empty/clipped. Root cause: graphical help overlay scene contains shape layers only, while ANSI help text is suppressed in affordance-scene chrome mode. Fix by rendering readable ANSI shortcut text for help overlay instead of an empty graphical-only panel, and avoid the empty clipped control layers.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm markdown table alignment: build cells directly
description: Replace table-cell alignment padding `format!` calls in `crates/kittui-affordances/src/markdown.rs` with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only `align_table_cell_text(...)`; preserve markdown table alignment rendering tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Prove: deliberately slow backend cannot stall UI thread
description: Add a SlowFakeServer that sleeps 500ms in capture(). Attach two backends to a MultiCompositor: SlowFakeServer + FakeServer. Assert that tick() returns within 33ms regardless of the slow backend's state, and that the slow backend's window eventually shows a non-empty frame after its first capture completes. This is the regression test for the pump architecture. Parent epic: bd-031e54
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add pure terminal renderer for shell view model
description: Implement an old-terminal/DEC/Unicode fallback renderer for the shell view model that draws panes/chrome as terminal text rather than kitty graphics frames.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm apps scene: build backdrop label directly
description: Small kittwm apps scene performance cleanup: apps_scene builds the backdrop layer label with format! from already-known counts and bounded labels. Build the apps backdrop label directly into a preallocated String while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui-ffi: make runtime_configure mutate runtime
description:
Large gap: `kittui_runtime_configure` returns Ok but only stores the requested JSON in `last_error`; it does not actually change runtime configuration. Platform bindings and long-lived hosts need a real reconfigure path rather than destroying/reopening handles.

Scope:
- Implement `kittui_runtime_configure(runtime, json)` by rebuilding `rt.inner` from the same JSON config shape as `kittui_runtime_new_config`.
- Clear `last_error` on success; set it and return a non-OK status on bad JSON/config/build errors.
- Add targeted FFI tests proving transport/probe and terminal support change after configure.

Acceptance:
- Configure changes probe transport/renderer-visible config on an existing runtime.
- Configure can disable terminal placement support and subsequent place returns Runtime error.
- Targeted FFI tests and ABI snapshot still pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm SDK wait-json default requests: build directly
description: SurfaceHandle wait_text_match_json and wait_output_match_json still format WAIT_TEXT_JSON/WAIT_OUTPUT_JSON request strings. Build these through the direct surface payload helper while preserving validation and JSON parsing.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm: nix package should bundle quartz backend on macOS
description: Operator report: when installed as nix package, 'kitwm --backend quartz' fails with 'Quartz backend requires --features quartz on macOS'. The flake builds kittui-cli with default features (none). Fix: pass cargoBuildFlags/buildFeatures so darwin builds get sck (and therefore quartz) and linux builds get xvfb, so the system-native backend is always available without rebuild flags. Parent: bd-031e54.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: make kittwm info kittui/kitty-native
description:
Make kittwm info overview available as kittui/kitty-native UI. Add info-scene-json and info-kitty/info-graphics commands that render the same STATUS_JSON/CHROME_JSON/PANES_JSON snapshot as a labelled kittui scene, preserving existing info text behavior.

Acceptance:
- kittwm info-scene-json emits a kittui Scene with workspace/chrome/pane labels.
- kittwm info-kitty/info-graphics places that scene through kittui Runtime at chrome z-index.
- Existing kittwm info text behavior remains unchanged.
- Tests cover scene labels from synthetic status/chrome/panes JSON.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm runtime focus actions: Ctrl-A C-hjkl visible focus direction state
description: Wire keymap focus actions into live kitwm runtime state. Ctrl-A C-h/j/k/l should update a visible focus direction marker in the footer and log focus.left/down/up/right transitions. This makes another configurable action family real while tiling/window membership wiring catches up. Parent: bd-031e54; follows bd-5edc97/bd-7f00ef.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add native socket help catalog
description:
Large gap: the live native kittwm session socket has grown many commands (SPAWN_PTY, STATUS_JSON, PANES_JSON, FOCUS_PANE, CLOSE_PANE, LAYOUT, APPS*), but unlike the standalone daemon it has no HELP surface. Script authors have to know command names out of band.

Scope:
- Add `HELP` / `?` to `NativeSpawnQueue`.
- Add `HELP_JSON` with a machine-readable command catalog, categories, and short descriptions.
- Include all current native socket commands.
- Add targeted tests and update docs/wm.md.

Acceptance:
- `HELP` lists SPAWN_PTY, STATUS_JSON, PANES_JSON, FOCUS_PANE, CLOSE_PANE, LAYOUT, and APPS_JSON.
- `HELP_JSON` parses and contains a command record for LAYOUT.
- `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm help topic scene: build backdrop label directly
description: Small kittwm scene performance cleanup: help_topic_scene_for_cols builds the help-topic backdrop label with format! from a truncated topic label, line count, and command count. Add a direct preallocated label helper while preserving scene output and focused label tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: expose drag events in SEND_MOUSE
description:
Follow-up gap after native mouse drag routing: host mouse routing now preserves drag motion internally, but the public `SEND_MOUSE` socket/CLI command still only accepts generic `move`. External controllers cannot inject drag motions (`move-left`, `move-middle`, `move-right`) even though the session encoder supports them.

Scope:
- Extend `SEND_MOUSE` validation and `kittwm --send-mouse` validation to accept `move-left`, `move-middle`, and `move-right`.
- Update HELP/docs/README examples or wording for accepted events.
- Add focused daemon/CLI tests.

Acceptance:
- `SEND_MOUSE focused move-left 7 9` queues successfully.
- CLI helper accepts `move-left` and rejects unknown events.
- Targeted tests, `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm`, and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm runtime layout actions: Ctrl-A e toggle split and Ctrl-A = balance
description: Port two more safe defaults from ~/collective/modules/home-manager/wm.nix into terminal-safe Ctrl-A keymap: Mod+e toggleSplit -> Ctrl-A e toggle split axis, Mod+= balanceWindows -> Ctrl-A = balance. Add keymap vocabulary/defaults, visible runtime layout state in footer/log, and tests. Parent: bd-031e54; supports configurable WM defaults.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add SSH remote flags to kittwm shell completions
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: after adding remote apps/windows/displays/doctor/help, make shell completions surface the remote workflow flags too. Include --remote/--host and app helper flags such as --filter/--launch-first so SSH commands are discoverable while typing.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: route socket SEND_KEY to direct browser surfaces
description: Follow-up to direct browser surfaces and socket mouse routing: socket/CLI `SEND_KEY` currently queues `NativePaneCommand::SendBytes` with a key label and terminal escape/control bytes. For direct `HeadlessBrowserApp` panes this path calls `send_bytes`, which treats UTF-8 terminal escape bytes as text rather than dispatching DevTools keys. Map known `SEND_KEY` labels (arrows, page/home/end, tab/enter/escape/backspace/delete/insert, modifiers, F5-F12) to browser key methods when the target pane is a direct browser surface, preserving raw bytes for terminal panes. Add focused unit coverage for label mapping.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittui-cli: write render metadata manifest files
description:
Large shell-renderer gap: `kittui render <scenes.json> --out-dir DIR` writes deterministic PNG files, but the manifest is only available via stdout JSON modes. Shell scripts and external CI artifact workflows often need the manifest persisted alongside the files without redirecting/parsing stdout.

Scope:
- Add `kittui render ... --manifest PATH` for render metadata output.
- Support single-scene and batch render paths.
- For batch `--out-dir`, allow `--manifest manifest.json` to write the same manifest that `--json` would print, including filenames and optional base64 under `--json-bytes`.
- For single `--out`, write single render metadata to the manifest path.
- Add tests and README docs.

Acceptance:
- `kittui render scenes.json --out-dir DIR --manifest DIR/manifest.json` writes PNGs and a manifest file without requiring `--json`.
- Targeted render command tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Document kitty spec deviations and conformance status
description:
Add a docs/protocol-conformance.md (or DESIGN.md section) that enumerates every section of https://sw.kovidgoyal.net/kitty/graphics-protocol/ and marks kittui's status as supported / partial / unsupported, with links to the bead tracking any partial/unsupported items. Update README.md status line once the P0/P1 children of this epic land.

Parent epic: bd-3dc8c7
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm kitty placement payload: build escape directly
description: Replace `format!("{ESC}_G{fields}{ESC}\\")` in kitty placement command assembly with a direct preallocated payload helper. Scope only `crates/kittui-kitty/src/lib.rs` placement payload construction; preserve exact kitty placement grammar tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add SDK layout state convenience helpers
description: Operator-requested kittwm SDK/design-cleanliness slice: status and panes JSON can report layout labels including columns/rows/grid/floating/fullscreen, but SDK clients must compare strings to reason about WM interaction mode. Add small typed convenience helpers on Status and PanesStatus for floating/fullscreen/tiled layout checks so drag/focus automation can branch cleanly.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittui-md components-only mode for generated component inspection
description: Add a kittui-md --components mode that prints only generated component records, without outline/link/image/metadata sections. This gives a concise human-readable view of the Markdown-to-component conversion. Include output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: End-to-end SSH demo: serve here, attach from another terminal
description:
Practical demo + script: launch kittui-wm serve on host A, ssh from host B with KITTUI_WM_DISPLAY=:0 forwarded, run kittui-wm attach. Confirm Quartz capture pixels travel over SSH and pointer events route back. Capture screenshots from both terminals to prove same-session-different-viewers. Parent epic: bd-031e54

---

Duplicate of bd-624e22
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: make terminal/app surfaces fit their containing split
description: User report: terminal/app content is a fixed square disconnected from the native~N window chrome. Each terminal/app surface should fit the dimensions of its containing split; the app adapter must map that app-area geometry to PTY rows/cols or equivalent surface dimensions. Define/enforce the surface sizing contract across native panes so captured frames match pane app_bounds and chrome. Acceptance: PTY is resized to pane app rows/cols on split/layout/host resize; rendered terminal frame matches app_bounds; tests cover rows/cols propagation and no fixed-square fallback.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm kitty chunked raw upload headers: build directly
description: Replace formatted header construction in `kittui-kitty` chunked raw RGB/RGBA upload paths with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only `encode_chunked_raw(...)` in `crates/kittui-kitty/src/lib.rs`; preserve exact raw upload and multi-chunk grammar tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm-browser: place PNG frames through kittui Runtime
description: Move kittwm-browser's kitty image placement through kittui::Runtime instead of hand-encoding kitty upload/placement in the app. Add a Runtime PNG-frame placement helper with explicit placement options so first-party browser surfaces use kittui runtime transport/placement semantics while preserving the current absolute placement/no-placeholder behavior. Avoid kittwm-bar/session reservation work.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: docs: update kitty probe diagnostics status
description:
Docs follow-up after the kitty probing stack landed. Update docs to reflect that pure `a=q` encoder/parser, bounded response reader, and opt-in `kittwm doctor --probe-kitty` diagnostics are now implemented, while normal rendering remains non-probing by default.

Scope:
- Update docs/kitty-response-probing.md, docs/protocol-conformance.md, docs/wm.md and/or docs/README.md as appropriate.
- Mention `KITTUI_KITTY_PROBE=1` and `kittwm doctor --probe-kitty`.
- Clarify response/probe support is opt-in diagnostics, not render-loop default.
- Keep docs-only.

Acceptance:
- Docs reflect the landed kitty probe stack.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add native socket layout axis command
description:
Large gap: native kittwm panes support row/column layouts from keyboard shortcuts, and the socket can spawn/focus/close panes, but external controllers cannot switch the live layout axis. A DISPLAY-like terminal WM needs scriptable layout control.

Scope:
- Add a typed native socket command `LAYOUT columns|rows`.
- Include the current layout axis in native socket `STATUS` output.
- Apply layout commands in the native session loop, reflowing visible panes and updating status snapshots.
- Add queue parsing and layout-axis helper tests.
- Document the attach command in docs/wm.md.

Acceptance:
- `LAYOUT rows` over the native session socket queues a layout command.
- `STATUS` can report `layout=rows` or `layout=columns`.
- Targeted tests and `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: add kittui-ghostty timelapse chunk-lines option
description:
Add a chunk-size control for kittui-ghostty PTY timelapse replay so generated headless Ghostty frame sequences can be tuned for command output density.

Acceptance:
- kittui-ghostty supports --chunk-lines N for --pty-timelapse-command, defaulting to 1.
- N must be nonzero.
- Captured PTY bytes replay into libghostty-vt in chunks containing up to N newline-terminated lines.
- Existing stdin, --demo, --command, --pty-command, --scroll, --timelapse-demo, frame manifest, and labeled --montage modes still work.
- Generate/post a fresh labeled montage in the session using --chunk-lines.
- Run focused validation.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui inline badge segment divider components
description:
Add more inline components beyond chip.

Scope:
- Add `kittui inline badge`, `kittui inline segment`, and `kittui inline divider` (or equivalent minimal set) using the same output modes and theme/style tokens as chip where applicable.
- Components should be usable in shell prompts/statuslines and default to kitty graphics with explicit plain/ansi/tmux fallbacks where sensible.
- Keep behavior deterministic and one-line.
- Add tests for output shape and dry-run JSON/bytes for kitty modes.
- Validate targeted kittui tests/build and diff check.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Make the wgpu backend a production-quality library backend
description: Operator direction: use the cacophony project as inspiration for canonical wgpu setup examples, but do not cargo-cult it because GPU support there may not have worked reliably. Treat kittui as a well-written library: design a robust wgpu backend abstraction with explicit adapter/device lifecycle, headless/offscreen compatibility on macOS/Linux, deterministic CPU fallback, clear errors, resource reuse across frames, no hidden global state, parity tests against CPU for supported nodes, and documentation of unsupported GPU features. This should refine/coordinate with bd-6c1165 (probe cache) and the renderer semantic beads rather than leaving GPU as a best-effort stub.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm kitty upload tests: build expected payloads directly
description: Replace remaining test-only formatted expected kitty upload payload strings in `crates/kittui-kitty/src/lib.rs` with the shared direct `kitty_graphics_payload_with_body(...)` helper. Scope only medium/raw upload grammar test expectations; preserve exact tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: docs: document kittwm clipboard read policy
description:
Docs gap after runtime clipboard policy work: docs still say clipboard read support is absent.

Scope:
- Update docs/wm.md and docs/kittwm-sdk-plan.md to describe cache-only `CLIPBOARD_JSON` and default-deny `KITTWM_CLIPBOARD_READ=allow|1|true|yes` policy.
- Clarify this reads only kittwm's cached OSC52 writes from nested apps, not the host OS clipboard.
- Keep SDK wrapper status as future unless already landed.

Acceptance:
- Docs accurately reflect native socket clipboard policy.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-launch scene: build command label directly
description: Small kittwm-launch scene performance cleanup: launch_plan_scene_for_cols still builds the command layer label with `format!("kittwm-launch-plan-command:{command}")`. Build that label directly into a preallocated String while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: trim configured workspace label
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: workspace_label() accepts KITTWM_WORKSPACE values that are non-empty after trim, but returns the original untrimmed string. A value like ' dev ' can leak spaces into top-bar scene ids/status labels and make custom workspace chrome look inconsistent. Scope: return the trimmed label while preserving the default '1' fallback, and add focused top-bar tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm terminal font read context: build directly
description: Replace `format!("read font {}", path.display())` in `crates/kittui-wm/src/native.rs` terminal font loading with a direct preallocated helper. Scope only terminal font read context label construction; preserve exact label text.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add natural kittwm remote HOST list aliases
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: support natural `kittwm remote HOST list`, `kittwm remote HOST list apps QUERY`, `kittwm remote HOST list windows`, and `kittwm remote HOST list displays` aliases that reuse the existing pooled-SSH app/window/display listing paths. This makes remote app/window/display requests easier to discover and type from a local kittwm session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm keymap table: write rows directly
description: Small kittwm keymap text-output performance cleanup: Keymap::render_table appends prefix and binding rows by formatting temporary Strings before pushing them into the output buffer. Write those rows directly into the existing String buffer while preserving output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm doctor should wrap long readiness lines
description: `kittwm doctor` prints long `transport note`, `renderer`, `socket`, and `next steps` lines that can overflow narrow/default terminals and wrap at column 0, making the daily-driver diagnostic hard to scan. Add a small bounded text wrapper for doctor key/value rows so continuation lines align under the value column. Scope: text doctor output only; avoid browser/mouse/startup work owned by other agents. Filed from dev-4 burndown session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: make kittwm keymap kittui/kitty-native
description:
Make kittwm keymap inspection available as kittui/kitty-native UI. Add keymap-scene-json and keymap-kitty/keymap-graphics commands that render the resolved keymap as labelled kittui Scene layers, preserving existing keymap text/check behavior and --keymap PATH loading.

Acceptance:
- kittwm keymap-scene-json [--keymap PATH] emits a kittui Scene summarizing prefix/binding count.
- kittwm keymap-kitty/keymap-graphics [--keymap PATH] places that scene through kittui Runtime at chrome z-index.
- Existing keymap and keymap --check behavior remains unchanged.
- Tests cover scene labels from a synthetic/default keymap.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-renderer: pad terminal fallback pane titles
description: Audit finding: pure-terminal fallback renders pane title text with truncate_cells but does not pad/clear to the visible title width. When a title/status shrinks, stale characters from the prior title can remain on the row, creating chrome artifacts/flicker. Pad clipped pane titles to their visible width before writing.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add SDK event helper for signed detail integers
description: SDK follow-up: EventEnvelope exposes detail_u64 but not signed integers, so event consumers must index raw JSON for signed cell deltas/offsets such as floating_dx/floating_dy or future signed drag metadata. Add detail_i64(key). Filed from ongoing kittwm SDK event/detail audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittui-cli: make probe report detected terminal capabilities
description:
Large gap: `kittui probe` currently reports hard-coded kitty support instead of the actual `TerminalInfo::detect()` result, making it unreliable for shell scripts and external hosts that need renderer/transport decisions.

Scope:
- Update `kittui probe` to emit the detected terminal descriptor (`columns`, `rows`, `cell_size`, `supports_kitty`, `supports_unicode_placeholders`, `transport`) plus renderer/version/config provenance.
- Preserve `--force` cache invalidation semantics.
- Add targeted tests for JSON shape using environment-controlled detection, especially tmux passthrough and Windows Terminal unsupported kitty cases.

Acceptance:
- `kittui probe --json` no longer hard-codes capability booleans.
- Tests assert probe output follows `TerminalInfo::detect()`.
- Existing CLI build remains green.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui-md metadata JSON includes component details
description: Extend kittui-md --metadata-json to include a stable components_detail array with component kind, text, and suggested width/height. Keep the existing components count for compatibility and add tests for the new JSON shape.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm WAIT_MS argument errors: build directly
description: WAIT_TEXT_MS/WAIT_OUTPUT_MS argument errors still use format! for ERR <verb> requires window, milliseconds, and needle. Build that shared reply directly while preserving wait validation coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: docs: SDK browser surface spawn status
description:
Docs follow-up after `SurfaceSpec::browser` landed. Update SDK/WM docs to state that browser surfaces are now spawnable through the SDK via the first-party `kittwm-browser` PTY transport, while richer dedicated browser surface protocol remains future work.

Scope:
- Update docs/kittwm-sdk-plan.md and docs/README.md or docs/wm.md.
- Mention `SurfaceSpec::browser("https://...")` and first-party PTY-backed transport.
- Clarify `SurfaceKind::Other` remains unsupported and dedicated browser/X/Quartz protocols are still future work.

Acceptance:
- Docs match landed SDK browser surface behavior.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: docs: SDK HELP_JSON catalog helper status
description:
Docs follow-up after typed SDK HELP_JSON catalog helper landed. Document `HelpCatalog`, `HelpCommand`, `Kittwm::help_catalog`, and `Kittwm::help` as the typed SDK path for the native command catalog.

Scope:
- Update docs/kittwm-sdk-plan.md and docs/wm.md or docs/README.md.
- Mention helper is read-capability gated and maps to existing HELP_JSON.
- Keep docs-only.

Acceptance:
- Docs reflect typed SDK help/catalog helper.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm keymap scene: build backdrop label directly
description: Small kittwm keymap scene performance cleanup: keymap_scene builds the backdrop layer label with format! from binding count, bounded prefix label, and duplicate count. Build the keymap backdrop label directly into a preallocated String while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: extract browser DOM/ARIA semantic snapshots
description: Implement the first DevTools DOM/ARIA semantic snapshot extractor for HeadlessBrowserApp. Map common controls such as labels, buttons, links, text inputs, checkboxes, radio/select controls, and progress/range nodes into kittwm SemanticSurfaceSnapshot/ComponentNode values. Preserve screenshot fallback for opaque content. Follow-up from bd-2250e1.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: plan browser DOM/ARIA semantic adapter
description:
Semantic adapter gap: browser surfaces are currently screenshot/pixel capture. Plan the first browser DOM/ARIA semantic adapter that can expose labels/buttons/inputs/links/forms via kittwm semantic surfaces while preserving screenshot fallback for canvas/video/custom content.

Scope:
- Add an in-repo design note for browser DOM/ARIA/DevTools semantic adapter architecture.
- Define mapping from DOM/ARIA roles to SDK ComponentRole/ComponentNode/ActionKind.
- Define event/update loop, hit-testing/focus/action routing, and fallback to screenshot for unsupported content.
- File concrete follow-up beads for a minimal adapter proof.

Acceptance:
- Docs describe browser semantic adapter approach and limitations.
- Follow-up implementation beads exist.
- git diff --check passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm evidence: let headless ghostty drive interactive PTY input
description: Our proof images have degraded into text-note PNGs. kittui-ghostty needs enough PTY control to host/render kittwm features directly: allow scripted PTY input and bounded timeout so agents can launch kittwm/kittwm helpers, send keys, and capture the actual terminal surface instead of a note.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: forward Insert key input to pages
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: browser input routing now forwards Delete/Home/End/PageUp/PageDown and arrows, but still ignores CSI 2~ for Insert. Some focused web editors and controls use Insert for overwrite/paste-mode behavior, and ignoring it leaves an input parity gap. Scope: parse ordered CSI 2~ input, dispatch DevTools Insert keyDown/keyUp events, and add focused parser/key coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm swap result status: build directly
description: The swap-action result status still formats window/error suffixes with format!. Reuse direct action result status builders while preserving exact output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm process log test path: build directly
description: The kittwm process event log test still builds its temp log filename with format!. Build the filename directly while preserving timestamped log validation.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-bar overlay: avoid intermediate ANSI style strings
description: Kittwm burn-down follow-up: kittwm_bar_overlay_style now precomputes styles once per overlay render, but it still builds foreground/background via separate format!-allocated strings before concatenating. Scope: write ANSI fg/bg escapes directly into the style buffer, remove the intermediate helpers if unused, and preserve overlay style tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm: emit semantic snapshot and action events
description:
Semantic runtime observability gap: SEMANTIC_PUBLISH, SEMANTIC_FOCUS, and SEMANTIC_ACTION mutate semantic snapshot state, but the native EVENTS stream does not emit semantic-specific notifications. Add semantic events so SDK clients do not have to poll SEMANTIC_SNAPSHOT after every mutation.

Scope:
- Emit events such as semantic_snapshot_ready, semantic_focus_changed, semantic_value_changed, and semantic_action_invoked when published snapshots change.
- Keep existing status/pane/focus/layout events unchanged.
- Include surface/window id, component id, action id when relevant, and revision/focus/value detail where practical.
- Add targeted daemon EVENTS tests using the in-process queue.

Acceptance:
- Publishing a semantic snapshot produces a semantic snapshot event.
- Semantic focus/action commands produce appropriate semantic events.
- Event JSON remains schema_versioned and compatible with existing stream.
- Targeted tests and git diff --check pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm raw error key: build bounded key directly
description: raw_compositor_error_key truncates message/log payloads and then uses format! to join them every error redraw. Build the bounded redraw key directly into a preallocated String while preserving bounded payloads and visible error behavior.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: topic-specific CLI help command
description:
Daily-driver UX source work: add topic-specific command help for `kittwm`.

Scope:
- Implement source changes (not docs-only) for `kittwm help <topic>` or equivalent topic help command.
- Suggested topics: `start`, `panes`, `input`, `inspect`, `session`, `events`, `apps`.
- Output should be concise and generated in cooked mode, no raw terminal/session entry.
- Reuse existing help/catalog/shortcut data where practical.
- Add focused tests for at least two topics and an unknown-topic error.
- Avoid daemon/session runtime changes unless strictly needed.

Acceptance:
- Users can run `kittwm help panes` (or implemented equivalent) to get focused help.
- Targeted kittwm tests/build and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: docs: refresh kitty protocol conformance status
description:
Docs drift: docs/protocol-conformance.md still says raw RGB/RGBA (`f=24/32`) and file format hints are partial/PNG-only, but raw RGBA/file/tempfile/shared-memory and zlib work has landed. Refresh kitty protocol conformance status.

Scope:
- Update raw RGB/RGBA and file/temp/shared-memory status in docs/protocol-conformance.md.
- Mention `f=32` raw RGBA, file/temp/shared-memory grammar, zlib/auto compression where appropriate.
- Keep unsupported terminal response reading / a=q capability probing as open unless implemented.
- Docs-only.

Acceptance:
- Protocol conformance docs match current kitty transport capabilities.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: implement native PTY edit CSI modes
description:
Terminal fidelity gap: native PTY snapshots do not handle common edit CSI sequences used by line editors and TUIs: insert/delete characters, erase characters, and insert/delete lines. Missing these sequences leaves stale characters in kittwm panes and `READ_TEXT` automation output.

Scope:
- Implement CSI `@` (insert character), `P` (delete character), `X` (erase character), `L` (insert line), and `M` (delete line) in native `TerminalState`.
- Clamp counts and operate within the current row / screen.
- Add focused parser snapshot tests.

Acceptance:
- Text snapshot tests demonstrate each edit mode.
- Targeted kittui-wm tests and `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm help topic scene: build heading label directly
description: Small follow-up to help-topic scene label cleanup: help_topic_scene_for_cols still builds the heading label with format! from topic and heading labels. Add a direct preallocated heading-label helper while preserving scene output and focused label tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: bindings-ts: expose runtime configure
description:
Large gap: FFI and Python now support live runtime reconfiguration, but TypeScript hosts still must close/reopen to change renderer/transport/terminal options.

Scope:
- Wire `kittui_runtime_configure` in TypeScript koffi binding.
- Add `Kittui.configure(options)` using the same option normalization as constructor and returning `this`.
- Add type declaration and fake-lib tests for success/failure last_error detail.
- Update TypeScript README example/API text.

Acceptance:
- `npm test --prefix bindings/ts` passes.
- configure forwards normalized JSON and errors include FFI last_error.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Avoid allocation in active drag footer labels
description: Render-performance cleanup follow-up: active title-drag footer state currently formats move/reorder labels into a String each frame before rendering the footer. Replace that with a small borrowed label struct and direct bounded footer append so active-drag chrome does not allocate on every frame. Filed from ongoing kittwm render-performance/drag UX audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Document kittui-md components mode
description: Update README kittui-md docs to include the new --components mode in examples and mode descriptions. Validate with docs checks.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm launcher: avoid lowercasing huge filter queries
description: Audit finding: `filter_candidates` no longer lowercases every launcher candidate, but it still lowercases the entire query before filtering. A pasted/pathological launcher query can allocate/scan huge text before candidate matching. Compare query bytes case-insensitively without pre-lowercasing the query.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: fix nix native pane test helper spawning missing test binary
description: Nix build fails in kittui-cli lib native pane tests because dummy_native_pane_app spawns current_exe/test binary path under target/.../deps, which is missing in the build sandbox PTY child spawn. Replace with a robust available helper program or skip helper-dependent tests gracefully.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm-terminal: add standalone first-party terminal app skeleton
description: Add a standalone kittwm-terminal/kittui-term binary that connects through kittwm-sdk, creates/replaces a window, and hosts a TerminalSurface with initial config/profile hooks.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: handle host terminal resize without crashing
description: Harry reported that kittwm crashes on host terminal resize instead of resizing the available WM space and triggering event-based resizes/repaints for hosted apps such as terminal panes and kittwm-bar. The fix should keep DPI/per-app resolution assumptions stable; resizing should change the available cell/canvas size, update pane/bar layout, emit resize events, resize hosted apps, and repaint safely.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Emit JSON for remote app launch requests
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: `kittwm remote HOST launch QUERY --json` is parsed, but launch-first mode currently prints the human launch line because launch mode takes precedence over JSON mode. Add a launch-first JSON mode so scripts can request structured host/kind/method/name/pid output after pooled-SSH remote app launch fallback.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Add SDK helpers for focused dirty-frame state
description: Operator-requested kittwm render-performance/SDK follow-up: SDK clients can list clean/dirty-frame panes, but focused-pane automation still has to fetch focused_pane() before checking whether the focused frame was clean/skipped. Add focused_frame_is_clean() and focused_frame_changed_tiles_ratio() helpers on PanesStatus and Status, with tests/docs, so render-performance overlays can query focused pane frame state directly.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Add kittui-md version discovery outputs
description: Add --version and --version-json no-input discovery outputs for kittui-md so users and tools can query the binary/package version independently of --about. Document it and add parser/output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm daemon wait-text test socket path: build directly
description: The daemon wait-text concurrency test still formats its per-process socket filename with format!. Reuse the direct test_socket_filename helper for that temp path while preserving WAIT_TEXT/PING concurrency coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-renderer: adaptive idle frame pacing
description: The native render loop still wakes at full FPS even after frames that emit no terminal bytes. Add adaptive idle frame pacing so consecutive no-output frames sleep at a lower idle FPS while active frames keep normal responsiveness. Keep env override, deterministic helper tests, and avoid frame telemetry/byte reporting scope.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm SSH ControlPath arg: build directly
description: The pooled SSH argument builder still formats ControlPath with format!. Build the ControlPath option string directly while preserving exact output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: alpha-aware composition of pane surfaces under chrome
description: Dogfood graphics gap: translucent chrome requires alpha-aware composition over terminal/app surfaces. Ensure raw RGBA/app frames, chrome scenes, overlays, and backgrounds compose in correct z-order with alpha. Acceptance: semi-transparent borders/top bar/overlays visibly composite over app content; tests or artifact inspection verify alpha values and layer order.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm session scene: build backdrop label directly
description: Small kittwm scene performance cleanup: session_scene still builds the session backdrop label with format! from kind, schema, layout, focus, and pane count. Add a direct preallocated label helper while preserving scene output and focused label tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Show title marker legend in graphical shortcut scene
description: Follow-up to bd-187e8f: the text/JSON shortcuts catalog includes the title marker legend, but `kittwm shortcuts-kitty` renders only the first 12 shortcut entries, so the legend is omitted from the graphical shortcut scene. Ensure the graphical shortcut scene keeps the title marker legend visible even when the catalog is longer than the scene row cap. Filed from ongoing kittwm UX discoverability audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-browser: forward Ctrl-Backspace input
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser forwards Backspace and many Ctrl-modified navigation/editing keys, but does not forward Ctrl+Backspace kitty-keyboard CSI-u forms (`ESC [ 8 ; 5 u` / `ESC [ 127 ; 5 u`). Web editors use Ctrl+Backspace for delete-previous-word. Forward it with the Ctrl modifier.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm CLI: validate send-bytes base64 locally
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: `kittwm --send-bytes-b64` currently formats `SEND_BYTES_B64` via the generic automation helper without checking that the payload is non-empty valid base64. The daemon rejects bad payloads after a socket round-trip. Add a focused CLI helper that validates base64 locally, preserves the provided encoded payload for the daemon, and rejects empty/invalid values before sending; add targeted helper coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Implement Transport::File and Transport::Memory upload paths
description:
Transport enum currently advertises File and Memory but encode_chunked always emits a=t,f=100 streaming base64. Per spec t= selects the transmission medium (d direct, f file, t temp file, s shared memory) and the payload becomes a path or shm name instead of pixel bytes. Implement real File (write PNG to a temp path, send t=f with path) and Memory (POSIX shm or anonymous mmap, send t=s) transports, with cleanup, error handling, and fallbacks. Add tests and a CLI flag to select transport.

Parent epic: bd-3dc8c7
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm pane-control requests: build directly
description: layout/move/resize/rename pane-control alias request builders still use final format! calls after validation. Build these daemon requests directly into preallocated Strings while preserving validation, lowercasing, trimming, and payload behavior.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: forward Alt-Arrow input to pages
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser forwards plain, Shift-, and Ctrl-arrow CSI variants to pages, but Alt-arrow CSI (`ESC [ 1 ; 3 A/B/C/D`) is still consumed. Many browser/editor widgets use Alt-arrow navigation. Forward Alt-arrow through DevTools modifiers while preserving existing CSI parsing order.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm raw frame tempfile names: build directly
description: Replace raw-frame tempfile filename `format!` construction in `crates/kittui/src/lib.rs` with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only file-transport raw RGBA frame temp path construction used by kittwm graphics transport.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm restore-session queued reply: build directly
description: Standalone daemon RESTORE_SESSION_JSON success replies still use format! for RESTORE_SESSION_QUEUED command=<n>. Build that reply directly while preserving restore-session queue coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-sdk: add semantic action convenience helpers
description:
SDK usability follow-up: SurfaceHandle::semantic_action accepts arbitrary Serialize payloads, but clients still hand-build JSON for common semantic actions. Add typed convenience helpers for focus/toggle/set text/set number/set bool/select so first-party apps and examples can drive semantic trees without raw action strings.

Scope:
- Add SurfaceHandle helpers such as semantic_focus_component, semantic_toggle, semantic_set_text, semantic_set_number, semantic_set_bool, semantic_select_one/semantic_select_many.
- Reuse existing semantic_action/semantic_focus socket wrappers and capability checks.
- Add tests with a small Unix socket server verifying command strings.

Acceptance:
- SDK exposes ergonomic helpers for common semantic actions.
- Helpers produce expected SEMANTIC_ACTION/SEMANTIC_FOCUS protocol strings.
- Targeted tests and git diff --check pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-sdk: add typed surface placement role enum
description: Add a typed `SurfacePlacementRole` enum and helpers so SDK apps can switch on app-surface/decoration/overlay roles without string-matching `composition_plane`. Wire `SurfacePlacementContract::role()` through it while preserving existing string fields for serialization. Scope SDK-only; avoid kittwm.rs inspection, helper binaries, Runtime/browser/bar/session changes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Triple-Ctrl-C exit guard; single Ctrl-C passes through
description: kittui-wm-demo (and the attach client) treat single Ctrl-C as an InputEvent::Char{ch: '\x03'} forwarded to the focused window. Track a counter that decays 1s after the last Ctrl-C; on count >= 3 within the window, restore terminal and exit. The 'q to quit' message in the footer changes to 'Ctrl-C Ctrl-C Ctrl-C to quit' once any backend is hosting an app that might consume Ctrl-C. Parent epic: bd-031e54
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Show heading anchor count in kittui-md rich status
description: Update kittui-md rich/interactive status line so heading-anchor coverage is visible alongside heading counts. Add targeted tests and keep changes narrow.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm help topics: mention daily guide commands
description:
Continue focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces, chrome-scene, or native move-log work. `kittwm help topics` lists focused help topics, but it does not point operators at the daily guide commands (`kittwm quickstart`, `kittwm examples`, `kittwm cheat`) that complement topic help. Add a concise daily-guides section plus focused assertion coverage so operators can discover both topic help and daily-driver guides from one entry point.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm chrome graphics: bound row rects on narrow scenes
description: kittwm chrome reservation graphics now inherit narrow-aware info widths, but chrome rows still use fixed 10px margins and width-20 sizing. On tiny widths row rects can exceed the scene footprint. Reuse bounded row geometry for chrome rows.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add app discovery commands to native socket
description:
Large gap: no-arg native `kittwm` owns the live DISPLAY-like socket, but it does not support the app discovery commands available on the standalone daemon (`APPS`, `APPS_JSON`, `APPS_FIRST`, `APPS_LAUNCH_FIRST`). Inside a native WM session, attach clients should be able to discover launchable commands before calling `SPAWN_PTY`.

Scope:
- Teach `NativeSpawnQueue` to handle `APPS`, `APPS_JSON`, `APPS_FIRST <query>`, and `APPS_LAUNCH_FIRST <query>` by reusing existing daemon helpers.
- Keep existing native socket spawn/focus/close/layout/status behavior unchanged.
- Add targeted tests for APPS_JSON and query routing on native queue replies.
- Document the attach commands in docs/wm.md.

Acceptance:
- `kittwm --attach -c APPS_JSON` works against a native session socket.
- Tests cover native queue APPS_JSON and APPS_FIRST responses.
- `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: add headless ghostty timelapse frames
description:
Add a headless libghostty-vt timelapse/frame-sequence example for progress evidence. Feed terminal bytes over multiple steps, extract render-state cells each step, emit deterministic PNG frames and a manifest, and post a montage artifact.

Acceptance:
- Add a kittui-ghostty-vt example that writes multiple frame PNGs over time from libghostty-vt render-state snapshots.
- Emit a JSON manifest with frame paths and basic metadata.
- Generate and publish a montage/progress image artifact.
- Keep portable; no Ghostty.app, desktop capture, runtime/browser/bar/session/SDK internals.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: forward UTF-8 text input
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser raw input parsing only forwards printable ASCII (0x20..0x7e). Valid UTF-8 text bytes are dropped, so non-ASCII characters cannot be typed into browser pages even after raw mode preserves 8-bit input. Forward valid UTF-8 text while preserving ordered handling for editing/navigation control keys and CSI sequences.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm swap state: build action string directly
description: Replace `format!("swap.{} -> {}", self.last_direction, self.label())` in `SwapState::apply()` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only swap state action string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing swap state behavior and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm browser semantic root id: build directly
description: Browser semantic snapshot mapping still uses format! for '<surface>.root'. Build that root component id directly while preserving browser semantic snapshot mapping coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-bar: kitty mode should use absolute no-placeholder placement
description: Standalone kittwm-bar --kitty still uses unicode-placeholder placement, which can show placeholder/ASCII-looking fields and fight text. Switch it to stable absolute no-placeholder placement with a high z-index, preserving text/JSON/scene fallbacks. Add tests that kitty mode options do not emit U=1/embed placeholder behavior where possible.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm daemon test socket path: build directly
description: The kittwm daemon test socket helper still formats the per-process socket filename with format!. Build the temp socket filename directly while preserving daemon test coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm composer test tempdirs: build directly
description: Replace composer test tempdir filename `format!` in `crates/kittui/src/composition.rs` with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only kittui composition/composer test tempdir path construction used by kittwm composition validation helpers.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add SDK helpers for resized kittwm panes
