description: Operator-requested kittwm UX polish slice: after prioritizing mode in the live footer, include the current non-empty pane count in the same high-priority state segment so users can tell at a glance how many windows are managed even when shortcut/log text clips on narrow terminals. Keep mode first and preserve existing truncation behavior.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-renderer: render loop batching and flush discipline
description: Reduce flicker by batching upload+placement+text writes per frame and flushing once after all surfaces/chrome are emitted. Audit scattered writes and avoid interleaving ANSI clears with kitty placements. Add deterministic tests around write order where possible.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm SDK replace close request: build directly
description: Kittwm::replace_current still formats the best-effort CLOSE_PANE request after spawning the replacement. Reuse the direct surface token request builder while preserving replace behavior.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui-md proof gallery covers lists footnotes math HTML and metadata
description: Update docs/examples/kittui-md-proof.md so the in-tree proof document exercises the expanded Markdown renderer coverage: bullet/ordered/task lists, code fence labels, footnotes, definition lists, inline/display math, inline/block HTML, and image placeholders. Validate with kittui-md plain/outline/metadata-json smoke checks.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui-md reports Markdown heading outline metadata
description: Capture heading levels/text in MarkdownDocument and show an outline section in kittui-md plain output so long documents are easier to scan. Add renderer/viewer tests while preserving existing component output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-sdk: add placement coverage role breakdown
description: Add a typed serializable role breakdown for `SurfacePlacementCoverage` so SDK diagnostics can emit app/decoration/overlay placement counts as data instead of hard-coded fields. Scope SDK-only; avoid kittwm.rs inspection, helper binaries, Runtime/browser/bar/session changes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm native host-sequence log: build directly
description: The native host-sequence forwarding diagnostic still formats window/bytes with format!. Build that log line directly while preserving exact output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: skip unchanged raw window chrome repaints
description: Bug-hunt finding while kittwm is reported unusably slow/flickery: the raw compositor loop still calls `write_raw_frame_chrome` for every window every frame. Even after skipping unchanged image uploads and throttling the footer, static windows rewrite identical title/border chrome text each tick. Memoize a raw-frame chrome key per image id (title/focus/mode/fullscreen/footprint) and only repaint chrome when that key changes; clear memo state when windows disappear or overlay clearing invalidates terminal rows. Add deterministic key coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: tolerate pane focus notification failures
description: Stability issue: kittwm sends terminal focus-in/out notifications with `native_send_focus_event(...)?` during focus changes, pane close, restore, and launcher actions. If a pane has focus reporting enabled but its byte input path fails (dead PTY, rejected adapter input, transient surface error), that notification can propagate out of the native loop and exit kittwm. Make focus notifications best-effort/non-fatal while preserving focus state changes, with focused helper coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm CLI split-pane request: build directly
description: The kittwm CLI split-pane helper still formats SPLIT_PANE socket requests. Build the request directly into a preallocated buffer while preserving validation and protocol output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add kittwm SSH workflow help and command catalog entries
description: Operator follow-up after the remote SSH slices: make the new workflow discoverable from kittwm itself. Add a focused SSH/remote help topic and command catalog entries/examples for local-to-remote apps, windows/displays, and terminal panes, referencing the already landed pooled SSH commands and the installed-remote model.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Match localized Linux desktop metadata remotely
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: no-remote-kittwm Linux desktop fallback indexes base Name, GenericName, Keywords, and Categories, but not localized variants such as `Name[en_GB]=`, `GenericName[fr]=`, or `Keywords[de]=`. Include localized launcher metadata in the remote candidate search payload so app discovery over pooled SSH works better on localized Linux desktops.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm browser user-data-dir arg: build directly
description: HeadlessBrowserApp Chrome launch still uses format! for --user-data-dir=<path>. Build that command-line argument directly while preserving browser profile path coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm kitty chunked upload headers: build directly
description: Replace formatted header construction in `kittui-kitty` chunked PNG/direct upload paths with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only `encode_chunked(...)` in `crates/kittui-kitty/src/lib.rs`; preserve exact still/animation multi-chunk grammar tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm native chrome scene: build cache key directly
description: Replace the `format!` in `native_shell_chrome_scene_key(...)` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only native affordance chrome scene cache-key construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve placement/scene-identity key semantics and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui-wm: add NativeSurface pointer input hook
description:
NativeSurface input gap: the common surface abstraction advertises text/key/mouse input broadly, but has no pointer/mouse hook. X/Quartz-style surfaces already have backend pointer injection.

Scope:
- Add small surface-level pointer types in `kittui_wm::native` (button + move/press/release event) without depending on kittui-input.
- Add `send_surface_pointer(&mut self, event: SurfacePointerEvent) -> Result<()>` to `NativeSurface` with explicit default unsupported error.
- Implement it for `XWindowSurface` by translating to `XPointerEvent` / `XButton` for the wrapped window.
- Leave PTY/browser/capture-only behavior unchanged for now.
- Add focused tests using a recording XServer test backend.
- Do not change live session defaults or socket behavior.

Acceptance:
- NativeSurface can model pointer input for XWindowSurface.
- Unsupported surfaces fail explicitly.
- Targeted kittui-wm tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add native socket relative focus commands
description:
Large gap: native kittwm socket clients can focus panes by explicit window token, but cannot perform relative focus navigation. Scripts/controllers first have to query PANES/PANES_JSON and compute the next window themselves, unlike the in-session keyboard focus cycle.

Scope:
- Add native socket commands `FOCUS_NEXT` and `FOCUS_PREV`.
- Drain/apply them in the native session loop using existing focus model.
- Include commands in HELP/HELP_JSON and docs.
- Add queue parsing tests and pure focus helper tests.

Acceptance:
- `FOCUS_NEXT` and `FOCUS_PREV` queue typed commands.
- Focus helper wraps correctly for multiple panes and handles empty/one-pane cases.
- `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm doctor JSON should write fields directly
description: `kittwm doctor --json` builds a buffer using many `buf.push_str(&format!(...))` calls, allocating a temporary string for each field. Use `write!`/`writeln!` into the existing buffer for scalar fields while preserving JSON output. Scope: doctor JSON text construction only. Filed from dev-4 burndown session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm CLI: add paste text alias
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: the CLI has short daily-driver aliases for `type`, `line`, and `key`, and exposes byte paste through flags, but lacks a simple `kittwm paste [WINDOW] TEXT` alias for bracketed-paste text. Add a paste alias that defaults to focused, preserves whitespace text payloads, rejects truly empty text, encodes to `PASTE_BYTES_B64`, and cover it with focused alias tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Document kittui-md HTML mode
description: Update README kittui-md docs to include the new --html mode in examples and mode descriptions. Validate with docs checks.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Expose kittwm pane stack order in status JSON
description: Operator-requested kittwm UX/design-cleanliness slice: after floating click-to-raise landed, SDK/JSON inspection still reports pane order implicitly only by array position. Expose explicit stack/z-order metadata in native pane status/PANES_JSON so SDK clients, diagnostics, and future drag/raise tooling can reason about visual stacking without depending on vector order. Add focused tests in daemon/session/SDK parsing as appropriate.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-browser: add examples to help output
description:
Continue the focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces or chrome-scene work. `kittwm-browser --help` already lists options, but it does not show concrete examples for the common paths: open a URL, print a semantic snapshot, render semantic kitty graphics, and print capabilities JSON. Add a concise Examples section plus focused assertion coverage so operators can copy a working command quickly.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Add reset-all control for floating kittwm pane positions
description: Operator-requested kittwm floating UX uplift: individual panes can be reset after dragging/nudging, and SDK helpers can find moved panes, but users still need to reset each pane one by one. Add a reset-all floating offsets control across socket/CLI/SDK/live session so a workspace can quickly snap all floating panes back to generated positions.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Add SDK event helper for frame elapsed milliseconds
description: Render-performance SDK follow-up: frame-presented events expose elapsed_us, but dashboards typically display milliseconds and currently have to divide manually. Add EventEnvelope::frame_elapsed_ms() as a small convenience helper for render timing diagnostics. Filed from ongoing kittwm render-performance event audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm help completions: add focused topic
description:
Continue focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces or chrome-scene work. Top-level help and examples mention `kittwm completions SHELL`, but `kittwm help completions` is not a focused topic. Add a small completions help topic with bash/zsh/fish examples, include it in the topic index/known topics, and add focused assertion coverage.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm help-topic stress text: build directly
description: The help-topic pathological label clipping test still builds a huge multi-line payload with format!. Build that stress payload directly while preserving clipping coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-launch plan command: build directly
description: Small kittwm-launch CLI performance cleanup: build_launch_plan still constructs plan commands with `format!("SPAWN_PTY {}", ...)` and `format!("APPS_LAUNCH_FIRST {}", ...)`. Build those command strings directly into preallocated Strings while preserving terminal/browser/app plan output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm doctor should exit cleanly on broken stdout pipe
description: Context: while validating bd-529f1e, piping `cargo run -q -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm -- doctor | head -12` printed the desired first lines but then panicked with `failed printing to stdout: Broken pipe (os error 32)`. The diagnostic command should behave like a Unix CLI and exit quietly or with a non-panic error when stdout is closed early. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-529f1e session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Persist and expose dragged floating pane positions
description: During bd-ac874b, floating panes gained in-memory title-row dragging via per-pane offsets, but the offset is not exposed in PANES_JSON/SDK metadata and is not persisted in SESSION_JSON/RESTORE_SESSION_JSON. Future drag/restore polish should expose `floating_dx`/`floating_dy` or absolute floating bounds in status surfaces and decide how session manifests preserve manually dragged layouts. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-ac874b session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Add SDK helpers for pane pid chip labels
description: UX/SDK follow-up: live kittwm pane status chips include `pid:<pid>` or `pid:-`, but SDK consumers only receive the raw optional pid. Add NativePaneDetail and focused Status/PanesStatus helpers for the pid chip label so clients can mirror live pane status text consistently. Filed from ongoing kittwm UX/SDK audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Add SDK helpers for dirty frame tile labels
description: Render-performance SDK follow-up: live kittwm pane chips display dirty-frame scale as `frame:<changed>/<total>`, and CLI has a changed_tiles_label helper, but SDK consumers only get the numeric ratio and must format the common label themselves. Add DirtyFrameStatus/NativePaneDetail/focused Status/PanesStatus helpers for the changed tile label so clients can mirror live pane chips consistently. Filed from ongoing kittwm render-performance/SDK audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm Ghostty snapshots: avoid per-row allocation and join
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: ghostty_snapshot_text builds a String per row, collects rows into a Vec, then joins with newlines. In pure-terminal fallback or any Ghostty text refresh, large grids pay avoidable per-row allocation and a second pass. Scope: append cell text directly into one preallocated String, preserving newline placement and adding focused coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-renderer: bound help overlay internal layer heights
description: Audit follow-up: help overlay internal layer x/width is bounded, but vertical row/key-chip rects can still extend below the bounded panel on short overlays because the break condition ignores the +2 chip offset and row separator y. Clamp/skip internal help overlay layer heights so rects stay inside the scene footprint.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: empty workspace first-run hint
description:
Daily-driver UX: make the empty first-launch workspace self-teaching.

Scope:
- When native kittwm has zero panes, render a concise centered/visible hint in the terminal shell view explaining the first actions:
  - C-a Enter / C-a t opens a terminal
  - C-a ? shows shortcuts
  - Ctrl-] exits
  - from another shell: `kittwm quickstart` / `kittwm info`
- Preserve top bar and no-pane behavior; do not auto-spawn a terminal.
- Keep pure terminal renderer safe; scene chrome can remain unchanged unless easy.
- Add focused renderer test.

Acceptance:
- Starting `kittwm` into an empty workspace visibly teaches what to do next.
- Targeted kittui-cli session tests/build and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm markdown image placeholders: build directly
description: Replace `format!("image: {alt} -> {url}")` in `crates/kittui-affordances/src/markdown.rs` with a direct preallocated helper. Scope only markdown image placeholder text construction; preserve image metadata/rendering tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm toggle state: build action strings directly
description: Replace `format!("fullscreen.toggle -> {}", self.label())`, `format!("float.toggle -> {}", self.label())`, and `format!("toggle ignored action {other}")` in `ToggleState::apply()` with direct preallocated String helpers. Scope only toggle state action string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing toggle state behavior and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: publish native pane cursor position
description:
Large terminal automation gap: native pane status and READ_TEXT expose screen contents but not cursor position. Controllers cannot tell where a prompt/caret is, and external previews cannot draw cursor-aware chrome. The PTY parser already tracks cursor row/col, but it is not published.

Scope:
- Expose `PtyTerminalApp::cursor_position()` from native terminal state.
- Add optional `cursor_col` / `cursor_row` to `NativePaneStatus`, PANES_JSON, and STATUS_JSON pane details.
- Include cursor position in text `PANES` output.
- Add tests and docs mention.

Acceptance:
- Native pane status includes cursor fields when available.
- Targeted kittui-wm/daemon tests and `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: make kittwm daily help kittui/kitty-native
description:
Make kittwm daily-driver help surfaces available as kittui/kitty-native UI. Add quickstart/examples/cheat scene-json and kitty/graphics commands that render existing text content as labelled kittui Scene layers, preserving existing text behavior.

Acceptance:
- kittwm quickstart-scene-json, examples-scene-json, cheat-scene-json emit kittui Scenes summarizing the existing content.
- kittwm quickstart-kitty/examples-kitty/cheat-kitty and graphics aliases place scenes through kittui Runtime at chrome z-index.
- Existing quickstart/examples/cheat text output remains unchanged.
- Tests cover scene labels for the three help surfaces.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: support shift-tab in SEND_KEY and browser surfaces
description: Keyboard/input UX issue: first-party `SEND_KEY` accepts `tab` but rejects `shift-tab`, even though browser surfaces and many terminal apps use Shift-Tab for reverse focus traversal. Add `shift-tab` / `backtab` to the daemon key parser (terminal payload `ESC [ Z`) and route that label to `HeadlessBrowserApp::send_shift_tab` for direct browser panes. Preserve existing terminal behavior and add focused parser/mapping tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm completions: build bash and zsh scripts directly
description: After fish completions and borrowed completion words, bash/zsh completion generation still does `completion_words().join(" ")` before embedding the word list. Build the bash/zsh scripts directly into one output String and append the space-separated word list in place. Scope: kittwm completion text generation only. Filed from dev-4 burndown session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: Capture live kittwm frame before alternate-screen teardown
description: From bd-5eedb3 user-facing analysis: bounded live `kittwm` proof captures through `kittui-ghostty --kittwm-proof-command 'timeout 2s kittwm'` only show the shell command and `[exit 124]`, not the empty workspace/top bar. Add a live-session proof/snapshot mode that captures a representative kittwm frame before raw/alternate-screen teardown, or a kittwm command that renders one stable live frame and exits. Artifacts that only show command/exit are regression evidence, not UI proof.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm process log clock: build directly
description: The kittwm process-log timestamp helper still formats seconds/milliseconds with format!. Build that clock string directly while preserving exact output shape.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm runtime invalid placement errors: build directly
description: Replace placement dimension mismatch `format!` construction in `crates/kittui/src/lib.rs` with direct preallocated String assembly. Scope only Runtime::place_at_with_options invalid-placement error text used by kittwm graphics placement validation.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm-launch app discovery errors: build directly
description: Small kittwm-launch CLI performance cleanup: app discovery error paths still format `find/launch app via discovery: <err>` diagnostics. Add a direct helper for app discovery errors and use it for find/launch paths while preserving messages.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm overlays: bound text dialog width on narrow terminals
description: Raw/native text overlays for quit confirmation, picker, and launcher render fixed 58-64 column boxes starting at column 2. On narrow terminals these rows wrap and cause flicker/stale text. Bound overlay inner width to COLUMNS before drawing and use saturating field widths.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm launcher overlay-open log: build directly
description: The raw compositor launcher overlay-open diagnostic still formats the query with format!. Build that log line directly while preserving exact output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: publish native pane pid and command
description:
Large gap: native kittwm status reports window/title/focus/weight/geometry, but not the underlying PTY child PID or command. Controllers cannot correlate panes with OS processes for monitoring, cleanup, or external tooling.

Scope:
- Expose `PtyTerminalApp::process_id()` from portable-pty child metadata.
- Store command and pid on native panes when spawned.
- Add optional `pid` and `command` fields to `NativePaneStatus` and PANES text/JSON/status JSON.
- Add targeted tests for status serialization.

Acceptance:
- Native PANES/PANES_JSON/STATUS_JSON include command and pid when available.
- Existing native tests pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: implement native PTY terminal reset controls
description:
Terminal-WM fidelity gap: native kittwm does not honor terminal reset controls. Shells/TUIs can emit RIS (`ESC c`) or DECSTR soft reset (`CSI ! p`) to recover terminal state; without support, stale modes such as origin mode, disabled autowrap, hidden cursor, bracketed paste, mouse reporting, or SGR style can leak into later output and corrupt rendering/snapshots.

Scope:
- Implement full reset for `ESC c` (RIS): clear visible cells/scrollback, reset cursor/saved cursor/style, reset scroll region, and restore default terminal modes.
- Implement DECSTR soft reset for `CSI ! p`: reset modes/style/scroll region/cursor state without clearing visible text.
- Preserve existing title behavior unless a test indicates otherwise.
- Add focused parser snapshot/state tests.

Acceptance:
- Tests show RIS clears text and resets modes/style.
- Tests show DECSTR preserves text but resets modes/style and scroll region.
- Targeted kittui-wm tests, `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm`, and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: back off unchanged semantic snapshots
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser semantic publishing still attempts a DOM/ARIA snapshot every 500ms even after repeated unchanged payloads. On static pages this is background CDP churn that can make browser panes feel slow. Add adaptive semantic publish pacing: keep fast cadence while changing, then back off after unchanged snapshots, with env override.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm browser metadata surface id: build directly
description: Headless browser SurfaceMetadata still uses format! for browser:<pid> surface ids. Reuse the direct browser surface id helper while preserving browser metadata coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: bindings-python: expose render_json PNG bytes
description:
Large gap: the Python binding exposes placement APIs but not the lower-level `kittui_render_json` API. External Python platforms may need PNG bytes for non-terminal previews, tests, or embedding without emitting kitty placement escapes.

Scope:
- Wire `kittui_render_json` and `kittui_bytes_free` in the Python ctypes binding.
- Add `Kittui.render(scene) -> bytes` that returns PNG bytes and frees the FFI byte buffer.
- Add fake-CDLL unittest coverage for render success and failure detail.
- Update Python README API list/example.

Acceptance:
- Python tests pass without a real shared library.
- `render` accepts dict/JSON scenes and returns bytes.
- FFI byte buffer ownership is released through `kittui_bytes_free`.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Report inner PTY exit status in kittwm Ghostty harness
description: From bd-5eedb3 user-facing analysis: `scripts/kittwm-ghostty-harness.sh --mode proof` writes `harness-manifest.json` status 0 when `kittui-ghostty` successfully renders output, even if the inner PTY command visibly failed (`[exit 1]` or `[exit 124]`). Add machine-readable inner command exit status to kittui-ghostty/harness artifacts and optionally a strict mode that fails the harness when the inner command fails. This prevents agents/CI from treating failed kittwm runs as successful PNG proof.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-renderer: theme/color application from kittwm config
description: Apply ~/.config/kittwm/config.yaml colorscheme/background values to live shell chrome/background instead of hardcoded colors. Preserve Nord defaults and expose config-derived theme info in config/status diagnostics.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: prioritize active workspace in constrained top-bar scenes
description: Follow-up to bd-974145: constrained text bars, native graphical text overlays, and kittwm-bar kitty overlays now prioritize the active workspace, but `BarModel::scene_with_prefix` still iterates normal workspace chip order for graphical scene layers. On very narrow scene widths a numeric active workspace like `3` can still be omitted after inactive `1` consumes the available chip space. Use active-first chip order for constrained top-bar scene layers and add focused scene coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm: saturate shortcuts scene row count
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: shortcuts graphics compute rows with entries.len() cast to u16 plus padding. If the shortcut catalog grows pathologically this can overflow/truncate before clamping, risking malformed scene metadata. Scope: use saturated row count accounting for shortcuts scenes and add focused helper coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm: render live top bar via kittui scene path
description:
Live top-bar integration follow-up: kittwm-bar can emit a scene artifact, but live native session still renders the top bar internally as ANSI text rather than through the same kittui scene artifact path.

Scope:
- Reuse the kittwm-bar scene/bar rendering model from within the live session where practical, or extract a shared small model helper if needed.
- Keep the reserved top-bar band and empty workspace behavior.
- For graphics/affordance scene chrome paths, place/render the top bar as a kittui scene in the reserved band.
- Keep pure terminal renderer stable with ANSI top bar fallback.
- Add focused tests for top-bar scene metadata/placement in the reserved band.

Acceptance:
- Live top-bar chrome has a kittui scene path aligned with kittwm-bar output.
- Pure terminal fallback still works.
- Targeted tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: reserve top-bar chrome band for tiling
description:
Live top-bar integration gap: `kittwm-bar` exists as a first-party SDK app/proof, and native session has an internal top bar, but the runtime does not yet have a clear reserved chrome band contract that clamps tiling below the bar across renderers.

Scope:
- Add an explicit native shell chrome reservation model, initially top bar rows = 1.
- Ensure pane layouts and app bounds are computed only within the tilable area below the top bar.
- Render the top bar as WM chrome in both pure terminal and graphics paths without overlapping panes.
- Keep empty workspace first-launch behavior.
- Keep `kittwm-bar` as a standalone SDK app for now; do not spawn it inside the WM in this bead.
- Add focused tests for reserved bounds, top-bar row, and pane app rows with/without panes.

Acceptance:
- Top bar is top-clamped, panes never render under it, and empty workspace remains stable.
- Targeted kittui-cli tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm SDK: trim surface handle IDs
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: `Kittwm::surface` stores the provided id string directly. Padded valid IDs such as ` native-1 ` are then interpolated into many socket commands, causing daemon-side token parsing errors or wrong targets after a round-trip. Trim surface handle IDs when constructing `SurfaceHandle` so valid IDs are normalized once; add focused coverage showing padded IDs produce clean commands.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kitwm apps: list launch candidates for future floating launcher
description: Add 'kitwm apps' subcommand that prints the current default launch command (KITWM_LAUNCH_CMD or xterm), whether it resolves on PATH, and a bounded list of launch candidates from PATH plus /Applications on macOS. This is the visible data-source slice for bd-8d64b1 before building the floating menu. Parent: bd-031e54; decomposes bd-8d64b1.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittui examples: standardize animation defaults
description: Continue animation coverage into first-party examples and showcases. Inventory: `crates/kittui-cli/examples/showcase.rs` and `crates/kittui-cli/examples/ratatui_showcase.rs` still use fixed 8-frame / 800ms animation settings, unlike the new standard 60fps / 180-frame / 3s period. Acceptance: update examples to use the standard loop contract and validate examples still compile.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm protocol payload request: build directly
description: protocol_payload_request uppercases the daemon verb into a temporary and formats the payload request. Build payload requests directly into a preallocated String while preserving payload trimming, case, and validation.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: validate status/chrome/panes geometry invariants
description: QA gap: STATUS_JSON, PANES_JSON, and CHROME_JSON should agree on workspace, top_bar_rows, tilable_rows, pane outer bounds, app bounds, focus, and layout after split/move/resize/host-resize. Add invariant tests over native session state. Acceptance: status surfaces are internally consistent and match rendered layout/chrome reservation.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add kittui-md interactive code-blocks toggle
description: Add a native code-blocks toggle to kittui-md --interactive so users can press s to inspect parsed code snippets without leaving the pager. Reuse existing code block metadata, expose the keybinding, document it, and add targeted pager/code-screen tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kitwm runtime workspaces: Ctrl-A c/n/p create and switch visible workspace
description: Wire the keymap workspace actions into live kitwm runtime state. Ctrl-A c creates a new virtual workspace and switches to it; Ctrl-A n/p cycles next/prev; footer/log show current workspace index/count and last action. This is a visible foundation for configurable WM actions before true per-workspace window membership. Parent: bd-031e54; follows bd-5edc97.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: emit pane frame presented events
description:
Runtime event gap: native graphics rendering captures/presents pane frames but EVENTS subscribers cannot observe frame presentation without polling status/dirty metrics.

Scope:
- Emit `pane_frame_presented` from the native graphics render path after a pane frame is placed/embedded.
- Include conservative metadata only: window, renderer (`kitty`/graphics path), frame format, pixel width/height, app cell bounds, whether a new upload occurred, whether upload was skipped by dirty-frame policy, changed/total tiles if available, and elapsed capture/present microseconds when easy to measure.
- Do not emit raw frame bytes or pixel payloads.
- Preserve pure terminal rendering behavior and all existing status/dirty-frame behavior.
- Add targeted daemon/helper unit test for event JSON shape; avoid broad/integration rendering tests.

Acceptance:
- EVENTS subscribers can observe graphics frame presentation events.
- Dirty-frame skip decisions are visible as metadata, not payloads.
- Targeted tests and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-top: add explicit options to help output
description:
Continue kittwm UX polish from the recent CLI/help diagnostics work. `kittwm-top --help` currently succeeds, but its help text stops after the usage/context paragraphs and does not spell out what `--json`, `--socket`, `--display`, or `--help` do. Add a concise Options section and a small focused assertion so the process viewer help is more operator-friendly.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX loop/operator instruction to keep working on kittwm UX improvements.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm: expose native surface coverage JSON
description: Expose the SDK architecture contract's first-party native surface coverage matrix as a focused `kittwm native-surfaces-json` / `surface-coverage-json` inspection command. This gives operators and app authors a small machine-readable way to verify kittwm-terminal/browser/bar are SDK-backed and kitty-graphics-native without parsing the full architecture contract. Scope to kittwm CLI inspection only; no live session, bar implementation, Runtime/browser, or docs/help slices.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui affordances: animate top-level panel/chip/divider/title-bar
description:
Continue animation coverage beyond `kittui inline` into first-party top-level kittui affordance elements. Inventory:
- `kittui panel` currently has legacy `--animate` with fixed 8@800 pulse, not the new `--animated --fps --frames` contract.
- `kittui chip`, `kittui divider`, and `kittui title-bar` currently render static chrome scenes only.
- `kittui box` has older `--animate frames@cycle_ms`; keep it for compatibility but align first-party affordances with the new all-frames-up-front kitty-native animation controls.
Acceptance: panel/chip/divider/title-bar support `--animated`, `--fps`, and `--frames`, default to 60fps/180 frames/3s, add phase-reactive effect layers, and have scene-json tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm launcher match tests: build stress strings directly
description: Replace test-only `format!("{}Needle{}", ...)` and `format!("{}missing", ...)` stress string construction in `launcher_match_score_avoids_candidate_and_query_lowercase_allocation` with direct preallocated helpers. Scope only launcher match-score test data construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve matching/allocation coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm SDK wait-json-ms requests: build directly
description: SurfaceHandle wait_text_match_json_ms and wait_output_match_json_ms still format WAIT_TEXT_JSON_MS/WAIT_OUTPUT_JSON_MS request strings. Build these through the direct timed wait request helper while preserving clamping, validation, and JSON parsing.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm architecture scene: build layer labels directly
description: Small kittwm architecture scene performance cleanup: architecture_scene builds each architecture layer row label with format! from layer metadata counts. Build layer row labels directly into preallocated Strings while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Emit JSON errors for remote app launches
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: `kittwm remote HOST launch QUERY --json` now emits structured success details, but launch failures still print plain text ERR lines. Emit JSON error envelopes for no candidate, missing graphical display, and unavailable Linux desktop launch fallbacks so pooled-SSH app launch scripts can diagnose failures without parsing human text.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Report actual desktop launch method in JSON
description: Operator SSH workflow follow-up: pooled-SSH fallback launch JSON reports the actual Linux desktop launch method (`gtk-launch`, `gio`, or `desktop-exec`), but installed/local `kittwm apps --launch-first --json` reports the generic `desktop` method. Return and report the actual launcher helper used so healthy remote kittwm launch JSON has better parity with fallback.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: kittwm-sdk: map SurfaceSpec to native surface contract
description: Add SDK helpers that connect typed `SurfaceSpec` requests to the architecture contract's first-party native surface coverage matrix. Apps should be able to ask `ArchitectureContract::native_surface_for_spec(&spec)` to verify that a terminal/browser request maps to an SDK-backed kitty-graphics-native kittui path. Scope SDK-only; avoid kittwm.rs inspection, helper binaries, Runtime/browser/session/bar changes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm-browser: use unique and cleaned Chrome profile dirs
description: Browser lifecycle/performance follow-up: `HeadlessBrowserApp::launch` creates a temporary Chrome `--user-data-dir` using `Instant::now().elapsed().as_nanos()`, which is near-zero and not a robust uniqueness source, and the directory is never removed on drop. Repeated browser launches can collide/reuse profile dirs and leak disk state. Use a process-local monotonic id for profile dir names, store the path on the app, and remove it during drop/termination. Add focused unit coverage for uniqueness.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Document kittui-md links mode
description: Update README kittui-md docs to include the new --links mode in examples and mode descriptions. Validate with docs checks.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm SDK process name parse: avoid rest Vec join
description: parse_ps_process_line collects remaining ps command tokens into a Vec just to join them. Build the process_name tail directly while preserving spaces between tokens.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: [broken-on-main] kittui-wm native.rs missing Instant import
description:
While validating bd-52183c with `cargo test -p kittui-cli pane --lib`, compilation failed before my daemon diff with:

`error[E0433]: failed to resolve: use of undeclared type Instant` at `crates/kittui-wm/src/native.rs:4479:17`.

This appears pre-existing on current main and blocks kittui-cli validation. Filed and claimed from dev-4 session; will fix with the current small validation batch.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm-launch scene encode error: build directly

description: Replace `format!("focus.{} -> {}", self.last_direction, self.label())` in `FocusState::apply()` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only focus state action string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing focus state behavior and tests.

title: kittwm daily help graphics: bound scene label payloads
description: Daily-driver graphical help scenes embed raw kind, heading, and row text directly in layer labels. Long generated/help strings can bloat scene metadata and redraw hashes. Clip diagnostic labels while preserving visible help text and geometry.

title: kittui-md preserves Markdown emphasis and strong markers

title: kittwm: quickstart command for first-run daily-driver use
description:
Daily-driver UX: add a first-run `kittwm quickstart` command.

Scope:
- Add cooked-mode `kittwm quickstart` subcommand that prints a concise first-run tutorial/checklist.
- It should explain: start `kittwm`, launch terminal with C-a Enter/C-a t, use `kittwm info`, spawn/read/type/wait aliases, pane control aliases, save/restore, and where to get focused help.
- Include a short "if a WM is already running" section with safe commands only.
- Keep it presentation-only; no daemon/session behavior changes.
- Add focused test for major lines.

Acceptance:
- New users can run `kittwm quickstart` and see the path to using kittwm as a daily driver.
- Targeted kittwm tests/build and `git diff --check` pass.

title: kittwm-launch scene: build heading label directly
description: Small kittwm-launch scene performance cleanup: launch_plan_scene_for_cols still builds the heading layer label with `format!("kittwm-launch-plan-heading:{status_label}")`. Build that label directly into a preallocated String while preserving scene output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm swap state: build label directly
description: Replace `format!("{}#{}", self.last_direction, self.swaps)` in `SwapState::label()` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only swap state label construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing swap state behavior and tests.

title: kittwm SDK semantic convenience test socket path: build directly
description: The SDK semantic_convenience_helpers_send_expected_commands test still formats its temp Unix socket path inline. Reuse the direct test_socket_path helper while preserving semantic convenience helper socket command coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add keyboard raise/lower shortcuts for floating kittwm panes
description: Operator-requested kittwm floating-window UX uplift: floating panes can be raised by mouse focus and controlled externally through raise/lower aliases, but live keyboard users cannot jump the focused floating pane directly to the top or bottom of the stack. Add in-session prefix shortcuts for focused-pane raise/lower, advertise them in shortcut/help/footer surfaces, and reuse the existing first/last stack-order move path.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm raw footer: avoid full string build before clipping
description: raw_compositor_footer_text formats the entire footer string, including potentially long paths/notes, then clips it to terminal width. Build the footer incrementally into a bounded buffer and ellipsize as soon as the visible width is filled to reduce raw compositor footer allocation/scanning churn.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: add send-file byte injection wrapper
description:
Large automation usability gap: `SEND_BYTES_B64` can inject exact bytes, but users still have to run an external base64 encoder and quote the result. Pasting files/scripts/binary payloads into native panes should be first-class from the kittwm CLI.

Scope:
- Add CLI wrapper `kittwm --send-file <window|focused> <path|->`.
- Read bytes from file or stdin, base64 encode internally, and send `SEND_BYTES_B64` via the default socket.
- Preserve exact bytes; reject invalid window tokens.
- Add help text, request-builder tests, and docs examples.

Acceptance:
- `--send-file focused -` can encode stdin bytes into a SEND_BYTES_B64 request.
- Targeted kittwm tests and `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm runtime GPU adapter labels: build directly
description: Replace GPU adapter debug-name `format!("{:?}", r.adapter_info().name)` construction in `crates/kittui/src/lib.rs` with a direct String helper. Scope only runtime GPU probe adapter label construction used by kittwm graphics diagnostics.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: make kittwm panes kittui/kitty-native
description:
Make kittwm pane inspection available as kittui/kitty-native UI. Add panes-scene-json and panes-kitty/panes-graphics commands that render PANES_JSON as a labelled kittui Scene, preserving existing panes/panes-json behavior.

Acceptance:
- kittwm panes-scene-json emits a kittui Scene with pane/focus/layout labels.
- kittwm panes-kitty/panes-graphics places that scene through kittui Runtime at chrome z-index.
- Existing panes/panes-json behavior remains unchanged.
- Tests cover scene labels from synthetic PANES_JSON.

title: kittwm kitty raw single-payload headers: build directly

title: docs: refresh SDK plan current-state gaps
description:
Docs drift: docs/kittwm-sdk-plan.md still lists several missing/immature items that have advanced significantly (probe diagnostics, semantic adapters, SDK helper coverage). Refresh current-state and remaining-gap language while preserving real future work like direct platform bindings, dedicated browser/X/Quartz protocols, and runtime-issued credentials.

Scope:
- Update docs/kittwm-sdk-plan.md only.
- Keep docs-only; no architecture churn beyond status accuracy.
- Clarify what is now landed vs what remains.

Acceptance:

Documentation gap after the semantic surface stack landed. Add an end-to-end semantic surfaces quickstart tying together SDK protocol types, SEMANTIC_SNAPSHOT/PUBLISH/ACTION/FOCUS socket commands, kittwm CLI wrappers, and the synthetic semantic app example.

Scope:

title: kittwm native chrome reservation log: build directly

title: kittwm-terminal: mature standalone SDK terminal app
description:
First-party app gap: `kittwm-terminal` exists as a skeleton, but it does not yet behave like a mature standalone first-party terminal app. Add typed status/event awareness and useful lifecycle behavior so it dogfoods the SDK rather than just spawning a PTY.

Scope:

- Add status/event feedback using typed SDK panes/events where useful.
- Improve CLI/help around replace/new-window/title/command behavior.
- Keep the built-in terminal path unchanged.

title: Document rustfmt baseline or add touched-file formatting check
description: context: while validating bd-a9ec5b/bd-2a0133, cargo fmt --check reported formatting diffs across many unrelated existing files, making it noisy as a pre-reintegration check for a narrow kittwm fix. Suggested fix: either rustfmt the repo once or document/use a touched-file rustfmt check in AGENTS/SPEC so workers do not accidentally create huge formatting diffs. Filed via reflect-session mixin from bd-a9ec5b/bd-2a0133 session.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: keep custom workspace visible in narrow text top bar
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: custom workspace labels are appended after default numeric chips in the text top bar. When render_i3bar truncates for a narrow terminal, the active custom chip can be cut off entirely, defeating the visibility fix. Scope: when constrained, prioritize the active custom workspace chip in the truncated text bar while preserving normal wide ordering; add focused top-bar coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm CLI: reject blank wait needles locally
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: CLI wait helpers (`--wait-text*`, `--wait-output*`, and `wait` alias) format raw needle strings into daemon WAIT commands. The daemon trims and rejects blank needles, so blank/whitespace-only CLI calls fail only after socket I/O and padded valid needles are sent unnormalized. Add CLI-side wait needle validation that trims valid needles and rejects blank needles locally; add focused helper coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-3

title: Showcase: cover every protocol mode end-to-end
description:
Rewrite crates/kittui-cli/examples/showcase.rs to walk the full protocol surface: Direct + Tmux + File + Memory transports; still + animated scenes; unicode-placeholder + absolute placement; multiple placements of the same scene; subcell offsets; delete + replace lifecycle; HiDPI cell-size override. Each section should be labelled and visually distinct in Ghostty/kitty. Verify against the kitty spec sections it exercises.

Parent epic: bd-3dc8c7
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

Add EventEnvelope helpers for frame_changed_tiles_label(), frame_changed_fraction(), and frame_changed_percent(). Filed from ongoing kittwm render-performance event audit.

title: Prove: latency + bandwidth under SSH

title: kittwm-launch: add explicit options to help output
description:
Continue the focused kittwm UX/help polish without overlapping active native-surfaces or chrome-scene work. `kittwm-launch --help` currently explains usage and backend choices, but it does not include a compact Options section for flags like `--replace`, `--new-window`, `--dry-run`, `--status`, plan rendering modes, backend selection, title, or help. Add a concise options list plus focused assertion coverage so operators can scan the launcher command quickly.

creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm launcher: avoid lowercasing every candidate during filtering
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: launcher filtering lowercases every path/app candidate string on each query, allocating and scanning full candidate text. Large PATH/app lists or pathological names can add input-latency/flicker while typing in the launcher. Scope: replace per-candidate lowercase allocation with bounded/no-allocation ASCII case-insensitive matching in the raw WM launcher filter, preserving exact/prefix/contains ordering and adding focused tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm info output: write pane rows directly
description: Replace the remaining `out.push_str(&format!("  {focused} {window}  {title}{bounds}\n"))` in `format_info_output(...)` with direct `String` appends/writes. Scope is only the pane row output path in `crates/kittui-cli/src/bin/kittwm.rs`; preserve existing text output and tests, and add narrow coverage if needed.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittui inline prompt status examples command
description:
Add runnable inline prompt/status examples and smoke command.

Scope:
- Add source-level `kittui inline examples` (or similar) that prints copy/paste examples for zsh, bash, and tmux statusline usage.
- Include examples for kitty/default graphics, prompt-safe modes, tmux format fallback, and plain/ANSI fallback.
- Add smoke tests for important lines and ensure examples stay in sync with supported modes.
- This is a CLI feature, not docs-only.
- Validate targeted kittui tests/build and diff check.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm-browser: forward Alt-Enter input
description: Audit finding: kittwm-browser forwards Enter, Shift+Enter, and Ctrl+Enter CSI-u, but consumes Alt+Enter CSI-u (`ESC [ 13 ; 3 u`). Some apps use Alt+Enter as a modified submit/newline/fullscreen shortcut. Forward it with the Alt modifier.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: docs: align docs map with refreshed SDK plan
description:
Docs follow-up after SDK plan current-state refresh. Update docs/README.md map/status if needed so it points readers to the refreshed SDK plan and summarizes remaining SDK/runtime gaps accurately.

Scope:
- Update docs/README.md only if current status bullets are stale after the SDK plan refresh.
- Mention broad typed SDK coverage and remaining gaps concisely.
- Keep docs-only.

Acceptance:
- Docs map aligns with refreshed SDK plan.
- `git diff --check` passes.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm pane title status scene: reuse direct title-strip label
description: Replace `format!("pane-{idx}-title-strip:{}", pane.text)` in the test-backed `native_pane_title_status_scene(...)` with the existing direct `native_pane_title_strip_label(...)` helper. Scope only the pane title/status test scene title-strip label in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing scene labels and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm launcher overlay: build cache key directly
description: Replace `format!("active={};query={query};selected={}", ...)` in `launcher_overlay_key(...)` with direct preallocated String construction. Scope only launcher overlay cache-key string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing bounded query behavior and tests.

title: kittwm daemon restore-session test requests: build directly
description: The daemon invalid restore-session test still builds RESTORE_SESSION_JSON requests with format!. Build those test requests directly while preserving error/no-ghost-pane coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm raw compositor: adaptive idle frame pacing
description: Raw compositor loop still sleeps at the active frame target even when a frame emitted no terminal bytes. The native terminal path already has adaptive idle pacing. Add equivalent no-output idle pacing to the raw compositor loop using KITTWM_IDLE_FPS/default idle target, resetting to active pacing when output is written.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add kittui-md exit code discovery outputs
description: Add --exit-codes and --exit-codes-json no-input discovery outputs for kittui-md so users and tools can query exit code meanings independently of README text. Document it and add parser/output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Complete terminal transport probing and File/Memory transfer modes
description: DESIGN.md specifies TerminalInfo::detect(), automatic tmux detection, and kitty File/Memory transports (`a=t,t=f` and `a=t,t=s`) in addition to Direct/TmuxPassthrough. Current TerminalInfo only provides defaults/overrides, and kittui-kitty treats File/Memory like direct chunked base64. Implement environment probing over TERM/TERM_PROGRAM/KITTY_WINDOW_ID/KITTY_PUBLIC_KEY/TMUX/WT_SESSION, CLI transport override, file-transfer emission, shared-memory transfer where supported with safe fallback, and tests for all transport encodings.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm native mouse SGR payload: build bytes directly
description: native_mouse_event_payload uses format! to build SGR mouse escape sequences before converting to bytes. Build the byte payload directly while preserving terminal mouse reporting behavior.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: Add SDK active title marker prefix helpers
description: SDK follow-up: live kittwm now shows ◆ while a title drag is active, but SDK title_marker_prefix helpers cannot include the active marker for clients that know they are driving a drag. Add explicit active-drag variants while preserving existing helper behavior. Filed from ongoing kittwm SDK/drag UX audit.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm kitty doctor matched status: build directly
description: The opt-in kitty doctor probe still formats matched probe status strings. Build matched:<status> directly into a preallocated String while preserving diagnostic output.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: honor DEC auto-wrap mode in native PTY
description:
Terminal-WM fidelity gap: native kittwm approximates line wrapping but does not honor DEC auto-wrap mode (`CSI ? 7 h/l`). Some terminal apps disable wrapping while drawing fixed-width regions/status cells; native panes currently still wrap when additional printable characters arrive past the right edge, corrupting the next line and READ_TEXT snapshots.

Scope:
- Track DEC auto-wrap mode in native `TerminalState`, default enabled.
- Handle `CSI ? 7 h` / `CSI ? 7 l`.
- When auto-wrap is disabled, printable characters at/past the last column should overwrite/clamp at the last column instead of moving to the next line.
- Preserve existing default wrapping behavior.
- Add focused parser snapshot tests.

Acceptance:
- Test proves default wrap still advances to next line.
- Test proves disabled auto-wrap keeps writes on the last column.
- Targeted kittui-wm tests, `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm`, and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm apps JSON: build string arrays directly
description: Small kittwm CLI performance cleanup: app launcher JSON output uses json_string_array with map(format!).collect::<Vec<_>>().join(", "). Build the JSON string array directly into one preallocated String to avoid transient Vec allocation while preserving output.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add kittui-md limits discovery outputs
description: Add --limits and --limits-json no-input discovery outputs for kittui-md so users and tools can query numeric limits such as width bounds, terminal default clamps, and offset minimum independently of defaults. Document it and add parser/output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm examples: show zsh and fish completion setup
description:
Continue focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces or chrome-scene work. `kittwm examples` has a SHELL SETUP section, but it only shows the Bash completion install command while `kittwm help completions` now includes Bash, Zsh, and Fish setup examples. Add concise copyable Zsh and Fish completion setup commands to the examples page plus focused assertion coverage.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm raw footer: build fps labels directly
description: Replace the `format!("{live_fps:.0}")` and `format!("{peak_fps:.0}")` temporaries in `raw_compositor_footer_text(...)` with a direct preallocated FPS helper. Scope only raw footer FPS string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing footer text and clipping tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm: honor native PTY focus reporting
description:
Terminal-WM fidelity gap: kittwm runs multiple native PTY panes but does not honor terminal focus reporting (`CSI ? 1004 h/l`). Terminal apps that enable focus events expect `ESC[I` on focus and `ESC[O` on blur; without this, nested shells/editors cannot react when the WM changes focused pane.

Scope:
- Track focus-reporting mode in native `TerminalState` and expose it through `PtyTerminalApp`.
- When native WM focus changes (keyboard and socket focus commands, close/remove fallback, spawn focus), send focus-out to the previous focused pane and focus-in to the new pane only when the app has enabled focus reporting.
- Add focused tests for mode tracking and focus payload generation.

Acceptance:
- Parser test proves `CSI ? 1004 h/l` tracking.
- Unit test proves focus payloads are emitted only for enabled reporting and only on focus changes.
- Targeted tests, `cargo build -p kittui-cli --bin kittwm`, and `git diff --check` pass.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm PTY OSC parser: avoid Vec allocation when joining params
description: Kittwm burn-down finding: OSC title/notification/clipboard helpers build strings by collecting UTF-8 param parts into a Vec<&str> and then join(";"). OSC sequences can arrive frequently from shells/apps, and this adds avoidable intermediate allocation. Scope: append UTF-8 params directly into one String with semicolon separators, preserving existing behavior and focused coverage.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-4

title: kittwm base64 decode errors: build directly
description: parse_window_base64 still uses format! for ERR <verb> invalid base64 replies. Build that shared decode-error reply directly while preserving send/paste bytes validation coverage.
creator: ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm: HiDPI and pixel-density contract for graphical WM surfaces
description: Dogfood graphics gap: kittwm should be constant in pixel resolution/DPI and re-render at correct dimensions, not scale old bitmaps. Define/enforce cell size, pixel ratio, and surface frame dimensions for app frames and chrome scenes across host resize/HiDPI. Acceptance: graphical chrome/app surfaces regenerate at current pixel dimensions; no blurred/scaled bitmap after host resize; tests validate pixel dimensions.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: kittwm layout action log: build directly
description: Replace `dbg.log(&format!("layout action: {msg}"))` in the kittwm keymap action loop with a direct preallocated helper. Scope only layout-action diagnostic log string construction in `crates/kittui-cli/src/session.rs`; preserve existing diagnostic text and tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Add kittui-md mode search discovery
description: Add --mode-search <query> and --mode-search-json <query> no-input discovery outputs for kittui-md so users and tools can find modes by flag, alias, or description. Document it and add parser/output tests.
creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev

title: kittwm help topics: list log topic
description:
Continue focused kittwm CLI/help UX polish without overlapping active native-surfaces, chrome-scene, or native move-log work. `kittwm help log` exists and now has a custom log-path example, but `kittwm help topics` does not list the log topic. Add `log` to the topic index/known topics plus focused assertion coverage so operators can discover the log help page from the topic list.

Filed from the persistent kittwm UX improvement loop after no ready dispatchable beads were available.

creator: ms-mac:kittui:ms-mac-kittui-kittui-dev-2

title: Show focused pane status in kittwm footer
description: UX follow-up: live pane titles have status chips, but the footer high-priority state only shows mode/pane count/focus and active drag. Add a bounded focused pane status segment to the footer so focused command/pid/frame state remains visible even when title chrome is obscured or a narrow terminal clips lower-priority hints. Filed from ongoing kittwm UX/render-state audit.
